4233080.title: Catjong 5: Paw Canyon
4233080.short_description: 和你顽皮的小猫一起踏上温馨的麻将3冒险吧！挑战 200 个有趣关卡，在温暖的阳光峡谷中建造迷人的西部小镇。

4672870.title: Physics Play
4672870.short_description: Experience a fun and simple physics simulation.

4338780.title: MicroFab
4338780.short_description: Build automated chip factories in a post-collapse 2047. Process silicon wafers, research advanced tech, and scale from basic processors to legendary quantum chips. Optimize your production lines, outmaneuver mega-corps, and dominate the semiconductor market.

4661560.title: 圣经问答测验
4661560.short_description: 与时间赛跑，挑战数百道圣经知识问答！考验你对圣经经文、著名人物、神迹奇事与比喻故事的掌握程度。适合基督徒社群与益智爱好者。

1409530.title: Neophyte
1409530.short_description: A mini topdown action roguelike with chaotic spell-slinging hack-n-slash combat. Collect spells, choose perks and discover powerful synergies to become an unstoppable monster-slaying wizard.

3779380.title: 逃离深渊的少女
3779380.short_description: 正在散步的废柴最强魔王“莉莉”，偶然发现一处出现得正好的“魔物栖息竖坑”。原本打算用特制的“超弱化诅咒拘束臂套”把路过的冒险者丢进去玩，结果——“诶？”反倒是废柴魔王莉莉自己掉进陷阱，直接坠入深渊……玩法很简单：往上爬就完事！你能爬到最顶端吗？！

3925420.title: Deathplane
3925420.short_description: Deathplane is a 2D puzzle-platformer game about moving the actual deathplane below the level up and down to kill enemies and find solutions and secrets.

4590020.title: Kill Source: Neon Hemorrhage
4590020.short_description: 一款残酷硬核的弹幕分数挑战射击游戏，包含 Boss Rush 和无尽竞技场模式。没有刷取，也没有没完没了的解锁流程，只有你独自迎战近乎不可能的绝境。

4565430.title: Mushroom Simulator Co-op
4565430.short_description: You're a mushroom. Your friends are mushrooms too. Grow big, enjoy the rain, watch out for worms and the forager with a basket. No quests, no bosses. Just you, the forest, and that worm that crawled up at the wrong moment again.

3995110.title: 女儿国的诅咒 The Curse of Womanland
3995110.short_description: 女儿国题材恋爱冒险文字游戏，你将穿越到女儿国，与神秘少女简灵相识，并逐步揭开女儿国背后血腥而黑暗的秘密。死亡、反抗还是沉沦？一切都取决你的选择。

4591390.title: Xeno Finder
4591390.short_description: A local multiplayer social deduction game for friends—featuring 8 categories and 240 unique expressions to keep every round fresh.

4674800.title: Beyond the Soil: Farming & Tales Prologue
4674800.short_description: 在这款 Beyond the Soil: Farming & Tales 的免费序章中，在大自然的心脏地带从零开始建立生活。耕种土地、管理资源并帮助山谷居民。您的耕种传奇从这里开始！

4687910.title: Visual novel: Shadows of Ravenhall Castle
4687910.short_description: An inheritance. An old castle among mist-covered hills. Elizabeth Gray thought she only had to arrive, inspect Ravenhall, and sign a few papers. But from the very first night, it becomes clear: the castle came to her for a reason, and its silence hides a secret that will not be easy to escape.

4610260.title: YASC
4610260.short_description: A tightly designed Sokoban-inspired puzzle game where every move shapes the solution. Plan carefully and work your way through a series of precise, grid-based challenges.

3788120.title: The Island of Doctor Morose
3788120.short_description: A horror adventure game inspired by the art of Theodor Geisel and the works of HP Lovecraft, featuring a mixture of point and click and survival horror elements.

3161690.title: The Grove
3161690.short_description: Scout out an uncanny pine grove for hidden artifacts and discover the fate of the children who went missing from a quiet town in Indiana.

4364940.title: ENDPUNK
4364940.short_description: ENDPUNK is a post-apocalyptic online shooter where you fight through nuclear ruins as an Immortal or a Necrotic. Scavenge supplies, upgrade your gear, and survive hostile zones. Jump into team FPS deathmatch to prove your strength.

4321500.title: 幸福家里蹲的养成方法
4321500.short_description: 突然造访的远亲家里蹲少女，将成为你的家人，两人一起展开一段温馨、救赎的同居模拟生活。

4553530.title: DarkRealms
4553530.short_description: A brutal 2.5D boomer shooter. Blast through demons and undead with shotguns, rockets, and a katana in fast-paced aerial combat. Dash through speedrun-focused levels packed with brutal bosses, aggressive movement, retro-inspired visuals, and heavy metal action.

4013840.title: WorldWatch
4013840.short_description: Worldwatch is a chaotic, satirical bullet heaven where you face endless hordes of “threats” that were never real enemies. Survive, evolve, and unleash destruction in the name of Earth’s most incompetent organization.

1976540.title: 蚀界档案
1976540.short_description: 一款由骰子驱动命运的克苏鲁风格战棋游戏。探索、解密、战斗，在策略棋盘上运筹帷幄，在疯狂与理智的边缘，指挥你的调查员小队。谨慎探索，明智抉择，在真相揭露前，别让疯狂吞噬你。
developers: 深圳市创源互娱科技有限公司

4435810.title: 焚天烈火之元素领主
4435810.short_description: 经典传奇3的1:1原味复刻，战法道三职业重聚！完美还原当年数值、全部地图与玩法——绿玉裁决、神舰跑船、多技能体系、强元素体系悉数归来。同时重磅加入境界、铭文等全新养成系统，以及跨服战场、神秘新地图。老情怀与新体验碰撞，焕新出发！

4650780.title: Solo Defending
4650780.short_description: Hold the line alone. Fight waves, build elevated cover, and unlock permanent tech in this action tower defense. 30 waves. 3 bosses. One heroic last stand.

4501240.title: 帝王霸业
4501240.short_description: 耐玩性佳：无套路、无强制消费 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

3313720.title: 今古群侠传
3313720.short_description: 玩腻了开局小虾米的江湖世界？ 来试试无敌流武侠爽游！ 纵横江湖，恩怨情仇！ 无需开挂，只求念头通达！ 念头通达！！！！ RPG玩法，回合制战斗，搜集武学当武侠世界的掌门，招募弟子，修炼武功，争霸天下。

3030190.title: 潘多拉的玩具盒
3030190.short_description: 《潘多拉的玩具盒》是一款快节奏、高重玩性的上帝模拟沙盒游戏。化身埃庇米修斯，在随机生成的像素大陆上创造并引导人类文明的发展。见证从聚落到城邦的演变，抵御异教徒的侵扰，传播自己的信仰，打造辉煌的文明。

3181890.title: 猫岛雨香
3181890.short_description: 《猫岛雨香》是一款以日本夏日的「猫岛」为舞台的谜题探索冒险游戏。化身为猫咪在岛上探索，与女主角一同解开猫岛背后的谜团吧！

3418990.title: 神陨之地
3418990.short_description: 在《神陨之地》展开一场夺回真相的冒险！穿梭于这片神明陨落的崩塌大地，探索废弃的神域，与扭曲的变异怪物战斗，收集散落的神力觉醒力量，解开神明陨落的真相。

4513840.title: Embers of the Gods
4513840.short_description: 【Embers of the Gods】是一款以奇幻世界为背景的次世代MMORPG。玩家可以选择战士、游侠和法师这三个截然不同的职业，踏上冒险之旅，逐步提升自身实力，最终攀登至更高境界。玩家可以与其他玩家在线组队，挑战神话中的巨兽，参与各种挑战和活动赢取丰厚奖励，体验刺激的团队战斗，并探索奇幻世界。

4265120.title: 绝地鸭卫
4265120.short_description: 《绝地鸭卫》是一款末世废土题材，融合生物朋克元素的2D横版平台动作肉鸽游戏。 化身十余位能力各异的「鸭卫」，以「击破」为核心，体验各具特色的硬核作战风格——不论是近战拼刀，亦是远程压制。在数百种技能道具中组合出丰富流派，以意想不到的方式克敌制胜。在虫族肆虐的末日世界，探索发现惊天灾变背后隐藏的真相。

2899880.title: Monkey See, Monkey Doo, Monkey Kiss You
2899880.short_description: Monkey See, Monkey Doo, Monkey Kiss You is a gripping first-person horror adventure. Stranded in a sinister forest, evade amorous monkeys while navigating treacherous paths. Face chilling encounters, uncover mysteries, and fight for survival in this pulse-pounding tale of fear and tension.

3189480.title: Robodies: Machine IS NOT Learning
3189480.short_description: Robodies: Machine IS NOT Learning is a chaotic VR classroom sim where you teach misbehaving AI robots by answering demands, throwing chalk, and slapping sense into them—before they glitch out or start fights!

4555570.title: EGGCONSOLE HYDLIDE II PC-8801
4555570.short_description: Hydlide Series Part 2. Become the chosen one and seal the evil consciousness targeting Fairyland! Utilize magic to conquer a field map six times larger than the previous game!

4621590.title: Dereology Chime
4621590.short_description: A 2D romance adventure set in a Japanese high school. Explore the campus freely, build your relationship with the heroine through your actions and choices, and uncover the legend of the “Bell of Lovers,” said to ring only for couples bound by true love.

4629400.title: Somewhere Café
4629400.short_description: 一款桌面环境音乐播放器，横跨 32 座城市，320 首曲目——每座城市都有属于它自己的声音，从抵达时的喧嚣，到凌晨三点的静默。

4586680.title: Ax RPG II
4586680.short_description: Endless tactics, shaped entirely by your choices. This is the second entry in a turn-based command RPG series where freedom of strategy defines every battle. With deep skill customization and flexible decision-making, each player forges a completely unique way to fight.

4623650.title: Koumii
4623650.short_description: Enter a magical duel where every turn is a new creation. Craft your own spells, predict your opponent's moves, and outplay them in a fast-paced battle to be the last player standing. A casual 2-player experience for friends and foes alike.

3088070.title: Dark Light: Survivor
3088070.short_description: 在濒临灭亡的多元宇宙中，幻影列车是你最后的希望。穿越一个充满梦魇怪物的后末日赛博朋克世界，在这款动作 Roguelike 生存游戏中，体验俯视与第三人称视角之间的动态切换、深度自定义系统，以及横跨多个时空的震撼战斗。

4420410.title: Tavern Timer
4420410.short_description: 欢迎来到你的酒馆！这是一个温馨又专注的工具，让你选择一个守护者来打理酒馆，同时你安心工作。200+装饰自由搭配，从地板到壁炉随心布置。内置番茄钟、自定义计时器和待办清单，专注从未如此魔法满满！

4582250.title: Socratic Smackdown
4582250.short_description: Socratic Smackdown is a 2.5D platform fighting game where players take control of animalized versions of philosophers in the fight for the next great thought. Play in a variety of stages as you explore all the characters home countries.

4269950.title: Snowdrift
4269950.short_description: In this cozy, quiet, romantic, science fantasy visual novel, read from the perspective of Arrim as he falls in love with Rosim: a wheelchair-bound woman with red eyes who lives alone with her robot servant, in a region that's been scarred with cold weather, after a war with aliens.

4052980.title: Aion - Part 1: Return to Palace
4052980.short_description: In a twisted world where dreams and reality blur and monsters wander, Aion awakens. Explore the dark, twisted landscape, avoid the dangers that lie in wait, and search for the clues that will lead you out of the nightmare.

4176500.title: 明日方舟：泰拉之影
4176500.short_description: 欢迎来到罗德岛。作为博士的你刚刚从石棺中醒来，然而身边的一切都是陌生的，但直觉告诉你，你所遇到的一切都正在被“侵蚀”。而作为博士的你，又该如何抉择呢？

4606260.title: OuterTide
4606260.short_description: OuterTide is a First-Person Exploration Platformer about a lone astronaut crash-landing into an asteroid belt hovering around a planet. Grapple throughout this mysterious environment, encounter alien creatures, and collect scrap to repair your ship.

4242770.title: Super Strike Champions
4242770.short_description: Super Strike Champions is a third-person online multiplayer soccer game where each player controls a single character. Experience fast-paced matches with special abilities, super shots, and competitive arena-style gameplay inspired by anime and arcade sports.

1583090.title: GIRL.EXE
1583090.short_description: You and your friends decided to summon a girl(friend?). Unfortunately, something went wrong. Can you get out or will you stay with her forever?

3222130.title: Who Do Voodoo
3222130.short_description: 一款社交推理游戏，在这里制作的卡牌会变成法术。保护盟友、破坏对手，或在魔法生存之战中捉弄所有人。

4246790.title: Glorgo's Microplastics Mine
4246790.short_description: Become an underpaid, overworked middle-manager for the callous mine boss Glorgo. Amass a hoard of wealth, navigate the vast eerie alien mines, and encounter voracious plastic beasts in a colorful, Y2K-themed dystopia filled with mayhem, microplastics, and monsters.

3808020.title: Oceanopolis 2000
3808020.short_description: Build the future under the sea in this retro sci-fi city tycoon.

4656630.title: Wonderful Realms
4656630.short_description: Visit many wonderful realms of various types and defeat a huge variety of enemies with a selection of weapons.

3233260.title: Case Files: Internal Affairs
3233260.short_description: The 3rd installment in the Case Files series. An FMV murder mystery, police interrogation, detective experience.

2369580.title: 轮回战纪
2369580.short_description: 《轮回战纪》是一款清版战斗风格的roguelike动作游戏，你将扮演背负罪孽的战士，踏上救赎之路：不断挑战新的关卡，斩杀源源不断的敌人，解锁更强大的英雄以及终极神器，最终彻底击败疯王、拯救王国，完成属于自己的赎罪。

3861150.title: The Dark Field
3861150.short_description: After receiving a strange message, Ahmed Raked finds himself at a remote farm with nothing but his phone to guide him. What starts as a simple job slowly twists into a dark, personal mystery—one that may be rooted deep in his past. Some jobs are more than they seem.

4598300.title: Vacanauta
4598300.short_description: Abduct and conquer worlds. VACANAUTA: a very irreverent cosmic adventure!

4379220.title: Move, Move, Melon!!
4379220.short_description: You’re Melon, a tiny hamster with a huge goal. Collect mix-ins, roll fast, and build momentum to churn the biggest ice cream scoop ever in this whimsical, on-rails runner.

4269100.title: What'Sub
4269100.short_description: 《What’Sub》是一款支持4人联机的潜艇撤离合作游戏。你将驾驶一艘破旧的“废铁级”潜艇，潜入百慕大三角的深处，从海底回收珍贵的宝藏。整装待发，潜入深海，冒着生命危险将战利品带回水面，然后向更深的海域再次进发。

2820850.title: A Tale of Silent Depths
2820850.short_description: 《寂静深渊传说》（A Tale of Silent Depths）是一款以末日后的水下世界为背景的回合制战术角色扮演游戏（RPG）。在程序生成的海洋中探索，指挥你的潜艇，与野兽、海盗以及超出船员理解范围的神秘生物战斗。

4377560.title: Balloons Factory Tycoon
4377560.short_description: Build and manage your balloon empire in this relaxing idle tycoon! Automate production, upgrade machinery, and earn massive profits to unlock vibrant, stylized cities. Start small and expand your colorful business across the world.

4623080.title: Argonauts Agency: Reflections from the Moon Collector's Edition
4623080.short_description: Reflections threaten the world! Help Jason and Medea gain a new ally and restore peace on Earth! Argonauts Agency is a classic time-management game with worker assignment: on each level you quickly gather resources, build and upgrade structures, clear obstacles.

4642060.title: InVein
4642060.short_description: Traverse this never-ending hospital as you discover clues of where and who you are. As each day passes by, the world around you decays, and you can’t help but wonder what is real. Utilize your time and resources as you roam these collapsing halls, but be careful; you may not be alone after all...

4617640.title: Keeb Quest: Typing Battles
4617640.short_description: Keeb Quest is a typing game where your keyboard is your weapon. Battle enemies, defeat bosses, and explore Choose Your Own Adventure stories - all while sharpening your typing skills. Multiple game modes, combos, and achievements keep every keypress counting.

4093970.title: The Ramen Shop
4093970.short_description: 这是一款恐怖游戏，在其中您经营一家拉面店。您需要从顾客那里接单，为饥饿的顾客提供热腾腾的美味拉面和冰镇甜饮。

4731150.title: Myth Finders 3
4731150.short_description: Dive into MythFinders 3, a hidden object adventure. Explore the world, uncovering secrets and legends of the past.

4431960.title: Island of mech 机械岛
4431960.short_description: 《Island of mech 机械岛》是一款2D点击类解密游戏，如果你也是解密游戏爱好者，这款游戏一定不要错过。相信我，你会有不同的体验。

4638830.title: 妄梦海之战 War Of Delusive Dreams Sea
4638830.short_description: 摆放船只，寻找敌人的位置，确认敌人的数量，然后开炮。 走走剧情，收集各种船只和大炮。 就是这样一个简单的游戏。
developers: 山屋锻戈 Mtn Forge Arms
publishers: 山屋锻戈 Mtn Forge Arms

4517240.title: sportive
4517240.short_description: Sportive is a online deck building card game with a sports theme. You compete against a Bot or other players, building up your playbook, gaining points, and redeeming them for trophies. The person with the most trophies at the end of the game wins.

4655250.title: 被裁员后开始送外卖
4655250.short_description: 这是一款关于城市生存的模拟经营游戏。 你将扮演一名失业青年，为了生活，骑上电动车，开始奔波在城市的大街小巷送外卖。 在一次次送餐途中，你将与朋友、亲人展开聊天互动——每一个选择都可能解锁不同的剧情分支与结局。 努力赚钱，维持生计，同时也在一次次对话中，找到属于自己的出路与希望。 生存、选择、成长——外卖箱里装的不仅是餐，还有人生

3859740.title: Let Me Play!
3859740.short_description: After shouting "Let Me Play!" to the cast in a theatre, the fiction comes crashing down as everyone, including you, becomes aware they're only following a script. Will you let the play continue? Or will you write your own ending?

4186170.title: Funny Park Reawakening
4186170.short_description: Dive into this terrifying adventure as you solve challenging puzzles that will put your skills to the test. Equip your charge crossbow and activate the colored buttons in time. Run and use your wits to survive Funnybear, who will be stalking you in every corner of the park.

4119820.title: Mutiny's Wake
4119820.short_description: 背景设定于海盗黄金时代的硬核生存类游戏。叛变后被困于敌对岛屿，你必须搜刮、狩猎、制作，并在对抗海盗、野生动物和不断减少的资源中生存下来。

3169360.title: Sea Walker Saga
3169360.short_description: 这是一场令人兴奋的蒸汽朋克冒险，其中包含战略和 RPG 元素。 与海盗搏斗，探索海底，建造自己的战斗岛屿，前往广阔的世界海洋寻找神话大陆！

3672760.title: Port Authority
3672760.short_description: Port Authority 是一款港口交通管理游戏，平静的港口逐渐陷入混乱。在交通流量淹没港口之际，绘制航线、引导船只、防止碰撞。

3784300.title: Mysteries of Old Tokyo
3784300.short_description: Save the Imperial Capital from supernatural invasion in a 90s-style adventure that uses real deduction and research skills. Explore Tokyo, snap photos and analyse evidence for 40+ landmarks, from prehistory to the present. Confront a cast of wandering spirits to separate truth from fiction.

4580670.title: 塔姆罗牌
4580670.short_description: 一款以塔姆罗牌世界观为核心的策略卡牌游戏，构筑仅由20张卡牌组成的精简牌组，在6个风格各异的剧情章节中展开紧凑而富有挑战的对战体验，搭配富有表现力的音乐，带来沉浸式占卜与博弈之旅。

4394150.title: Nerdy Quest
4394150.short_description: A nostalgic 1980s-inspired point-and-click adventure packed with puzzles, quirky humor, and bizarre pop-culture references. Explore cinematic environments, talk to eccentric characters, collect and combine items — and discover a surprising burst of action at the end.

3018360.title: Bug Alliance
3018360.short_description: Bug Alliance is a top-down Action Roguelite where every level-up reshapes your build. Trigger Synergies, conquer 20-wave maps with boss finales, unlock a 13-chapter story on higher difficulties—then dive into Chaos Surge with endless bosses, curses, and risky rewards.

4478650.title: Meowpire
4478650.short_description: 以神明的视角，见证猫咪们在这片土地上争夺领土。通过点击进行祈祷，发动神之力，并引导你支持的氏族走向统一——这是一款可以轻松游玩的神明游戏×点击游戏！

1962700.title: Subnautica 2：异星水域
1962700.short_description: 《Subnautica 2：异星水域》是背景设定在全新外星世界的水下生存冒险游戏，由Unknown Worlds倾力打造。可以单人游玩，也可以与好友组队开启四人合作模式。建造专属基地，制作不同工具，适应环境，水下求生。探索未知世界，揭开深海中隐藏的谜团。

4522280.title: Luna's Room
4522280.short_description: An unfamiliar room. Vague memories. Explore Luna's room through the objects inside it in this intimate narrative experience about loss, told as a classic-style graphic adventure.

4288460.title: DO NOT FEED THE VIRUS - Incremental
4288460.short_description: 培育你的生物体，收集生物质并扩张殖民网络。一款专注成长与进化的休闲鼠标增量游戏。

3065030.title: The Caribou Trail
3065030.short_description: The WWI story where your goal isn’t to kill, but to survive. In the still trenches, three soldiers learn the harsh truth of war: reckless missions, digging trenches, collecting dog tags and ghostly whispers in the dark. Home before the leaves fall, they thought.

2091020.title: 《烈焰之刃》 Blades of Fire
2091020.short_description: 黑暗奇幻风格的冒险，在这里，战斗、成长与命运，一切定于铸造钢铁。

4573210.title: Klifur
4573210.short_description: Minimalist 2D bouldering. Make your way through over 30 hand-made campaign routes or use the level editor to make your own routes and share them with friends!

3491670.title: Drifters Don't Brake: Midnight
3491670.short_description: A racing game where your car never stops accelerating and you can’t brake

2894100.title: Never Experiment On Cats!
2894100.short_description: The test cats have broken free! They're getting into all the equipment, from jetpacks to lawnmowers and paintball guns! Bounce, bash, and blast your way to the top of the scoreboard! Is there more to the lab? Who's behind it all?

4517670.title: SPACE HUG-DUNG
4517670.short_description: "Infiltrate mysterious planetary facilities to snatch the core 'Hug-Dung' and escape. Battle giant robots and alien creatures in 4-player co-op, secure the core, and return to the extraction pod in this sci-fi action experience."

4674200.title: Cupcake Swap
4674200.short_description: 一款轻松休闲的“三消”益智游戏，主题是可爱的卡通纸杯蛋糕。 通过匹配三个或更多相同的甜点来清除棋盘，可以挑战限时模式，或在无尽模式中放松游玩。

3525620.title: Wall Street Raider
3525620.short_description: Wall Street Raider offers the deepest stock market simulations in gaming history. Control publicly traded corporations, futures, options, and even crypto. Whether you want to make billions in equities, short-sell overvalued stocks, or hedge risk using derivatives, the market is yours to conquer!

1829270.title: RoadOut
1829270.short_description: Raise hell in this post-apocalyptic action RPG that mixes rotatable dungeon exploration and top-down racing mechanics. You’re Claire, a mercenary who survives by executing sabotage, delivery and murder contracts in The Dead Zone. Work for hire, thrash rival gangs and race for glory!

4384310.title: Cull The Crib
4384310.short_description: Cribbage meets roguelike deckbuilding. Score powerful hands to deal damage, unlock faction talents, and fight through increasingly dangerous encounters. Every hand is a gamble — every point matters.

1896760.title: 暴打联盟
1896760.short_description: 集结！开打！欢迎来到暴打联盟！ 你将化身被疯狂科学家制造出来的最强实验体，挣脱束缚后踏上复仇之路。带上你独一无二的能力，向那个创造了你们的疯子科学家讨回一切！ 从街头到全球战场，成群敌人、强悍 Boss、疯狂机器接连登场。熟悉的横版推进、畅快的连段暴打、纯正的街机清版快感，等待每一位玩家重新点燃热血！

3529690.title: 惊悚故事：雪孩子
3529690.short_description: 这是一部集动作与悬疑于一体的游戏，黑色幽默与阴森氛围在此交相辉映。与勇敢的男孩雪仔一起深入地狱，打败邪恶本身。拯救世界，成为英雄——但代价是什么？

4615250.title: Stellar Golf
4615250.short_description: Stellar Golf is a fast, stylish arcade mini golf game set in space, blending smooth air-hockey-inspired shots with trick-shot physics, neon obstacles, black holes, portals, bumpers, color changing puck mechanics, and 108 handcrafted holes across 12 vibrant courses.

4634070.title: Memories of the Pinewood Islands
4634070.short_description: "Memories of the Pinewood Islands" is a cozy walking sim and treasure hunting game where you explore the hauntingly gorgeous Pinewood Islands in search of some missing artefacts belonging to the Good King Harold. Immerse yourself in this rich and ethereal world to solve the realm's greatest mystery,

4405050.title: Onslaught
4405050.short_description: Onslaught is an action-adventure game set in a western mining civilization. Explore a dangerous town, descend into eerie mines, and fight to survive a brutal world bent on mining and murder. Surrounded by enemies, there is only one path to salvation: up.

4245140.title: Wizard Confidential
4245140.short_description: Sling spells and crack the case in a city full of bootleggers, corrupt cops, and vampires. Can you save your partner before a wizard dooms Seattle? A text-based interactive urban fantasy noir novel.

1142050.title: Deadhaus Sonata
1142050.short_description: The creator of Legacy of Kain is back. Become the undead in a third-person narrative-driven action RPG where your choices shape your legend and the world around you. Feed to grow stronger, embrace powerful classes, and carve your path alone or in co-op through a dark realm filled with secrets.

2523690.title: King Crab
2523690.short_description: 挖掘战壕，建造城墙，探索沙滩， 在 PC 或 VR 上抵御不断上涨的潮水，保卫你的沙堡！

3831720.title: Nova Patria
3831720.short_description: Nova Patria is a Roman Steampunk Colony Sim. In this alternate history, the empire never fell and lived on to discover the New World and steam power. Manage intricate supply chains, expanding cities, and innovations in a hopeful, procedurally generated, isometric simulation of industrial antiquity.

4661860.title: Starfish Simulator 👍
4661860.short_description: 现代游戏种类繁多，风格各异。勇敢的骑士、杰出的科学家，或是拯救世界的超级英雄，应有尽有。而这款游戏则带给你一种截然不同的体验。在这里，你可以化身为一只海星。

2706980.title: 漩光奇旅：争分夺秒
2706980.short_description: 在维里斯湾的中心，一位古怪的发明家和一位前卫的艺术家共同孕育了一个绝妙的想法。跟随玛格丽特和赫克托的脚步，踏上这段点击式冒险之旅，穿越时空，帮助他们阻止一场迫在眉睫的危机。

4384290.title: Rocket Cars
4384290.short_description: Rocket-powered cars meet competitive soccer in intense 3v3 matches. Master aerial tricks, teamwork, and split-second saves in this fast-paced, physics-driven sports game.

3794400.title: Swing of the Valkyries
3794400.short_description: 蜘蛛摆荡 × 弹幕 × Roguelike = 『Swing of the Valkyries』。这是一款极具挑战的3D平台游戏，你将作为人类最后的希望——女武神，在密集的弹幕中摆荡、冲刺和闪避！

4653330.title: OurLife
4653330.short_description: OurLife is a text-forward life simulator game filled with immersive, choice-driven systems that impact more than just the character you're playing. Live any life, make any choice: OurLife.

4627340.title: Normile
4627340.short_description: Normile is a first-person simulation game where you travel along the Kaluzhsko-Rizhskaya line in the Moscow metro as a rectangular player

4630290.title: 爪爪改造家 PawRebuild
4630290.short_description: 5位动物伙伴大显身手通过连连看的方式把脏乱废墟变温馨港湾。10大场景，每个场景5个改造阶段。共计超300种各类物品。新颖独特的纸板风格。没有时间限制，没有惩罚机制。可以轻松获得全成就。

4543920.title: A Playground Afternoon
4543920.short_description: A 3D platforming party game, play with your friends in a colourful environment and enjoy yourselves!

4663320.title: Dance of Y
4663320.short_description: 《Dance of Y》是一款以律动与节奏为主题的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家将在经典 RPG 战斗系统中操控角色进行攻击、防御与技能施放，通过规划每个回合的行动、持续强化角色能力，并在不断推进的战斗挑战中体验兼具策略深度与成长乐趣的单人冒险。

1602000.title: 酒店建筑师 Hotel Architect
1602000.short_description: 缔造您的连锁酒店商业帝国！设计酒店，调度员工，应对宾客，招待挑剔的评论家，从家庭旅馆到豪华五星酒店，亲手书写属于您的商业传奇。从边陲小镇、风景名胜，到繁华都市，让您的酒店遍布世界上每个值得驻足的地方。现在，迈出第一步，开启您的酒店大亨人生。

4635850.title: piano-BALL
4635850.short_description: A 2D game minimal indie experience featuring simple controls, short stages, and atmospheric exploration.

4671140.title: Swing Dynasty: College Tennis
4671140.short_description: An unrivaled college tennis video game. Play as a Men’s or Women’s Tennis coach, take control of a team, recruit players, develop your roster, and compete for national championships. Build a college tennis dynasty and become a legend!

4264340.title: 我自成道 I Am The Dao
4264340.short_description: 《我自成道》是一款融合了修仙网文世界观与即时自动战斗的修仙挂机模拟游戏。你的道途，将从凡界开始，经历灵界、仙界、直至纵横诸天万界，每踏入一方全新世界，皆会解锁独特玩法，每一次飞升突破，皆为印证大道的历程。最终，超脱万界束缚，证得只属于你的无上道果！

4519240.title: Ignore the Blackbird
4519240.short_description: Ignore the Blackbird is a handcrafted, narrative puzzle game, illustrated in traditional watercolours. Designed as a thoughtful experience, it features relaxing puzzles that drive the narrative forward, where piecing together the story itself is the game's ultimate puzzle.

4388820.title: Hexart City
4388820.short_description: 通过放置六边形地块来建造你的中世纪城市。收集资源，管理工人，并通过战略决策打造不断发展的经济体系。这是一种轻松却富有思考性的城市建设体验

4578060.title: 巡怪警備 -The Cursed Security-
4578060.short_description: 主人公是一名保安。 在进行夜间巡逻时，一些诡异的事情开始发生…… 本作是一款以办公大楼为舞台的短篇恐怖第一人称射击游戏。 采用多结局设定，结局将根据你的选择而改变。 请亲眼见证潜藏在寂静办公楼内的恐怖。

3774440.title: 帝国幻想乡~TOHOTOPIA
3774440.short_description: 4X战争游戏的热潮席卷整个幻想乡，“电竞大赛”热烈开幕，少女们踊跃参赛！ 一时间群雄并起，逐鹿中原。 无论是化身“法老”的蕾米莉亚、扮演“皇帝”的辉夜，还是“大帝”神奈子、“哲人王”神子—— 就在此刻，打开游戏，领导你的帝国，制霸幻想乡！

3928990.title: Food Processing Simulator
3928990.short_description: Build and manage your own food processing factory. Automate production with machines, work together with skilled employees to keep operations running smoothly, expand your facility, and keep inventory under control as you grow from a small workshop into a large scale production facility.

4443770.title: Zero Bugs Given
4443770.short_description: Zero Bugs Given is a tower defense / roguelike game designed with the ambition of making every run different from the others. Every wave, a pair of bonus and malus will force you to adapt in the best way you can. Build your defense and try survive as long as you can!

1461910.title: Rogue Command
1461910.short_description: 真正经典的 RTS，融合 Roguelite 构筑。以子弹时间般的精准度操控单位。空投基地，集结军队。每一局，都是全新的兵器库。打造能打破游戏的构筑。或被游戏打破。

4214820.title: 权力的游戏 : 国王大道
4214820.short_description: 《Game of Thrones: Kingsroad》是基于HBO电视剧创作的动作RPG游戏，以史无前例的规模，惊人的细节，生动展现了维斯特洛的风貌。 在冰冷的阴谋与火热的战争共存的这片土地上，你将不得不在荣誉和生存的危险边缘游走。当塞外的黑暗苏醒，王国礼崩乐坏，你当下的选择将成为维斯特洛新的历史篇章。

4490870.title: 罗马消消乐：三消游戏与城市建设
4490870.short_description: 以罗马帝国为背景、以故事情节为导向的三消游戏。重建颓败的市镇，将其发展成宏大繁荣的城市。选择优先建造的建筑，完成角色任务来探索故事，破解充满挑战性的谜题。参加限时活动，畅玩迷你游戏，与好友携手合作。

3972190.title: Mineral Mining Simulator
3972190.short_description: Turns raw rock into valuable minerals and jewelry grade gemstones through a hands on production chain. Mine ore, crush it into fragments, refine it, and scale your operation with better machines and smarter workflow. Optimize every stage of the pipeline to maximize efficiency, quality, and profit.

4645330.title: Flux Tower Defense
4645330.short_description: 带死亡惩罚的元素塔防。熔岩/冰川/闪电/钢铁属性，10级二阶，15级双属性。28成就、Steam排行榜、Steam Cloud云存档。

4676900.title: OuroborosSnake
4676900.short_description: A fast arcade snake game where eating your own marked tail grants huge score bonuses at high risk.

2587590.title: Iridio
2587590.short_description: Seized by criminals, the island designated for your research needs your help. Join Yatziri and the Wazhari tribe to liberate their hostages, explore hidden secrets, craft essential items and weapons, and strategically use fire and water in challenging puzzles and life-or-death battles for survival.

3566380.title: 蒼穹のダンジョン 忍び返しの霊峰
3566380.short_description: 攻克难攻不落的「Sky Dungeon Shinobigaeshi Peak」！ 制作关卡，并分享给全世界！ “微辣”风味的 2D 跑跳动作游戏！

4588410.title: Jeo-seung Bus : Underworld Bus
4588410.short_description: 你被困在了一辆行驶在死后世界的诡异巴士上。请仔细观察周围。发现异常请按下车铃，若无异常请入座前往下一站。你能平安抵达目的地吗？

4681400.title: Nova Fighter
4681400.short_description: Are you ready to face a brutal, fast-paced pixel-art 2D action platformer where every level is a test of skill? Slash through ruined lands, master high-speed combat, overcome precision platforming, and fight ruthless boss battles in a journey built for players who love a real challenge.

4660760.title: Skate Rush: 90s Retro Arcade
4660760.short_description: A fast free-to-play retro arcade skating game where you dodge obstacles, keep your speed, and chase a better score in quick single-player runs inspired by classic 90s energy.

4478540.title: One Day
4478540.short_description: “鬼差×阴阳眼”的恋爱喜剧？！ （应该是吧。）

4707530.title: Seafarer Demo
4707530.short_description: SEAFARER is a game set in the age of sailships where you play as a young captain commanding a merchant ship in search of fame and fortune. This demo includes a small portion of the game world where players can engage in trade, combat and exploration.

4702830.title: GummyGom Delivery Demo
4702830.short_description: 与你的啫喱熊伙伴们一起搬运板上的货物吧！每个人的动作都会影响板子的平衡，哪怕是一个小小的失误也可能让一切崩溃。

4627950.title: ORE x TRACTOR Demo
4627950.short_description: ORE x TRACTOR is a short, incremental game about demolishing space rocks with a variety of weaponry.

4715940.title: CUBOUNCE Demo
4715940.short_description: CUBOUNCE 是一款高速物理平台游戏，操控方块，通过弹射和勾爪摆荡在关卡中极限飞行，完成挑战

4651380.title: Gold ’n Goal Demo
4651380.short_description: Gold ’n Goal 是一款荒诞的增量足球游戏，在这里你会打进离谱数量的进球、赚取丰厚的€，并把你的球队训练成宇宙冠军！

4703520.title: Minimon: Tiny Idle Tactics Demo
4703520.short_description: A tiny idle monster-tamer that sits quietly in the corner of your screen. While you go about your day they fight for loot, levels, and glory.

4700800.title: 互联便签引擎 Demo
4700800.short_description: 这是游戏感知的随手记软件：记录的信息只属于当前进行的游戏。贴边隐藏，游戏内随时唤出；计算器、待办等游戏内一键使用。软件集成创意工坊，随时分享、下载便签；在游戏中与玩家实时聊天。

4467650.title: Peril in Prymkos Demo
4467650.short_description: Embark on a quest through the magical world of Prymkos. Explore ancient ruins, uncover hidden secrets, and face the mysterious Priests of Shaana in this story-driven fantasy RPG.

3234910.title: HYPERWIRED Demo
3234910.short_description: Pilot a ship with a charger hanging. Explore an ever-changing space an plug to recharge your energy while surviving the enemy breach in this cable-like space shooter with roguelike elements and plugged resource management.

4712890.title: Blood Park Demo
4712890.short_description: An atmospheric first-person horror game in the style of forgotten VHS tapes. Explore an abandoned park and underground catacombs, collect clues, avoid monsters, and fight them off with improvised items.

4320830.title: The Curse 404 Demo
4320830.short_description: 《The Curse 404》是一款心理恐怖解谜游戏，故事发生在一座被困于无限时间循环之中的神秘宅邸内。每一次从沉睡中醒来，周围的环境都会重置——但你所发现的线索却会保留下来。
developers: Yash Future Tech Solutions Pvt Ltd
publishers: Yash Future Tech Solutions Pvt Ltd

4007970.title: Gallery Nocturnea Demo
4007970.short_description: 登上以 BOSS 战 为主题的经典 2D 动作游戏《Gallery Nocturnea》的高塔顶端。使用剑进行 攻击、防御、闪避 等多种动作，击败各种 BOSS！

4338000.title: Saraab: Beyond The Veil Demo
4338000.short_description: A psychological horror visual novel about healing and destiny. When her brother disappears, Elham's desperate search plunges her into a world of haunting visions, buried truths, and battles against dark forces. Will she find her true calling and embrace the light? or will she succumb to darkness

3730810.title: 地龙神话：石器时代 试玩版
3730810.short_description: 俯视视角、2D、进化、生存、部落主题游戏 成为神明，进化你的信徒，在石器时代沙盒游戏中传播你的信仰

4544640.title: Monster Magnet Demo
4544640.short_description: Follow Michelle as she moves to a new town and meets 4 single boys and 1 single ghost. Grow closer to them and you'll get the opportunity to learn 2 of their secrets, changing the lives of everyone involved. Make choices throughout 10 linear storylines before confessing to one or both of them.

4730930.title: Yin Yang Fun Demo
4730930.short_description: 在这款独特的街机方块益智游戏中，考验你的反应速度和多任务处理能力。同时控制两个网格，消除两侧的方块行，跟上不断加快的速度，冲击最高分。双手，两个网格……方块游戏，再次挑战！

4718520.title: 扑克魔王 Demo
4718520.short_description: 《扑克魔王》是一款基于扑克牌的回合制卡牌Roguelike游戏。在游戏中，你将扮演一个植物，通过扑克对局击败敌人。从各种贴纸，标记和宫廷信物中进行选择，创造独特的构筑，最终击败最后的魔王。

4702550.title: Outclassed Demo
4702550.short_description: Outclassed is an arcade dungeon crawler roguelite where you combine unique class abilities to clear an expansive dungeon. Level up, collect items, and create powerful synergies to become truly outclassed!

4724670.title: Indomitus: Path of Ordeals Demo
4724670.short_description: 扮演不屈的英雄，直面无尽考验。'Indomitus' 是一款2D像素风肉鸽编组卡牌游戏。在实时自动战斗中使用卡牌，通过升级选择强力特质，并利用独特遗物打造协同效应。用你的战术克服重重磨难，高风险策略与深度成长等你来体验。

4703440.title: Stella Nova Demo
4703440.short_description: Build modular space stations, manage citizen crews, and master a deep crafting chain in a procedurally generated solar system with real orbital physics. Mine asteroids, smelt alloys, manufacture components, and expand across the planets!

4658460.title: Math Warudo: Grassland & Beyond Demo
4658460.short_description: A math adventure game featuring Toppy and Ame across multiple Warudos. Train your skills and uncover their identity in this casual yet rewarding math and dungeon-crawl like experience.

4696500.title: Poolrooms Museum Demo
4696500.short_description: Explore surreal liminal pool spaces and a strange waterless dungeon.

4688670.title: Cup and Counter: Coffee Shop Simulator Demo
4688670.short_description: 打造属于你自己的咖啡馆。制作各种咖啡，让顾客满意。保持咖啡店货源充足，资金流动顺畅，你就能迅速扩张，打造梦想中的咖啡馆。

4713740.title: Astrojumper Demo
4713740.short_description: Astrojumper is a fast-paced hybrid shooter. Seamlessly jump between orbital fleet battles and ground assaults to reclaim human worlds from the Anunnaki and uncover their true purpose.

4383380.title: XeGrader plus Demo
4383380.short_description: 射击与解谜交错的复古动作。本体验版收录了游戏序盘的 6 个关卡（LV01～LV06）与 Boss 战。玩家需一边击败敌人，一边解开各关卡中隐藏的谜题并向前推进。本作提供了令人联想到 80 年代经典游戏的视觉风格，与现代游戏设计相融合的独特体验。采用与正式版相同的解谜及进行系统，可充分体会到本作的魅力。

4724960.title: Pinball Tide Demo
4724960.short_description: Pinball Tide 是一款 roguelike 弹球游戏。操控挡板来获得分数，并有策略地赚取金币。使用分数强化玩法，花费金币抽取更高稀有度的球并进行合并。通过合并，你可以发现新的挡板和球。

4545890.title: Kill The Nova Demo
4545890.short_description: 经典解谜 × Roguelike 卡组构筑！收集独特方块，构建强大协同，通过“乘法”打出夸张的高分。通过达成目标分数来通关各个房间，然后把这些不可能的数字直接砸向最终Boss——开发者本人！Demo版可体验正式版的部分内容。

4609160.title: Night Errand Demo
4609160.short_description: Night Errand is a 2D detective adventure where you play as Sage & Nur, an unlikely detective duo solving murder and mixing coffee in the quiet town Morrowpines.

4698260.title: Hotel Paraíso Demo
4698260.short_description: What happened at Hotel Paraíso? Explore this ancient haunted establishment in a game that blends RPG, puzzle, and turn-based strategy mechanics, and investigate the powerful tremor that has unleashed thousands of supernatural creatures, as the dreamlike and the magical intertwine.

4708870.title: Stickman Obstacle Course Demo
4708870.short_description: Stickman Obstacle Course is a physics-based platformer where you play as a stickman, making your way through game show-inspired obstacle courses.

4730640.title: 荧烛 Ember Glimmer Demo
4730640.short_description: 在异变丛生的世界中，异变管理局背负着守护秩序的使命。这是一款动漫风格的3D第三人称射击刷宝游戏，将即时战斗与装备掉落深度融合，为玩家带来沉浸式的冒险体验。游戏打造了多样化的武器体系，风格各异的枪械和近战等武器。搭配角色元素专精技能进行战斗，构建个性化战斗流派。玩家将穿梭于异变地区，应对失控的前代AI与来自虚空的异变体，收集装备与材料应对更强大的敌人。探索，战斗，解决异变。

4720270.title: Nightmare Job Demo
4720270.short_description: Nightmare Job is a 2D platformer and puzzle game where you’ll overcome challenging precision levels while new mechanics are introduced in each stage. Difficulty progressively increases in an oppressive environment where anxiety and pressure never fade.

4724030.title: Vaultix Demo
4724030.short_description: 🎰 Every chest can make you rich… or end your run. How far will you go?

4612340.title: 闲暇岛时光 Demo
4612340.short_description: 一款贴在任务栏上的放置海岛经营游戏。1920×256 透明窄窗，支持自由缩放，不打扰你的工作和生活。试玩版开放农夫、伐木工、渔夫三位居民，10 种作物，5 类建筑，以及 1 万金币速通挑战。你忙你的，小岛自己会运转。

4712280.title: Rapid Escalation Demo
4712280.short_description: A fast-paced incremental space shooter where short battles fuel permanent upgrades and exponential growth.

4720610.title: DASH n CRY: Bursting Demo
4720610.short_description: Help Lala Sparks reignite her passion by bursting through hundreds of hand-crafted challenges! DASH n CRY: Bursting is a fast-paced 2D precision platformer. Every DASH matters, every CRY will make you stronger!

4549490.title: Dwarven Forge Demo
4549490.short_description: Master the early depths in the Dwarven Forge Demo. Use your fireball-flinging lantern to mine Iron and clear paths. Experience the core incremental loop: upgrade digging power, optimize ore yields, and craft Iron weapons for profit. Start your journey into the mountain’s secrets today!

4626630.title: Softscape Demo
4626630.short_description: Restore barren spaces into peaceful gardens in a relaxing first-person sandbox. Route water, shape terrain, place plants and decorations, then watch your world slowly return to life beneath the Grand Tree.

4719670.title: Gray Trading Demo
4719670.short_description: Gray Trading是一款放置类游戏，您可以通过非常规的方式交易股票、NFT、外汇等。您的目标是成为世界首富，以下是实现目标的几种方式。

4720450.title: Shipping Demo
4720450.short_description: Shipping is a hectic co-op game inspired by one of the most iconic arcade games about peculiarly shaped rectangles that you can play with up to three of your friends. Test your spatial awareness and see how far you can push yourself to ship as many boxes as possible before they overflow...

4726470.title: END US Demo
4726470.short_description: 在这片废墟之中，午夜从不降临好事。我们战斗、狩猎、建造。我们从大地上撕下仅剩的一切，只为多换取片刻的生存。你来到这里，以为自己是唯一的幸存者。也许你错了。这会是最后一个夜晚吗？

4707490.title: Ten for the Descent Demo
4707490.short_description: Assemble a team of flawed adventurers and send them into a descent where fear, conflict, and betrayal kill as surely as monsters. Push deeper for greater rewards or retreat before everything collapses. Every choice costs lives.

4595430.title: Weapon Gambit Demo
4595430.short_description: 掷出武器，步步为营！这是一款结合骰子与象棋的战术解谜小品。运用掷出的武器布局走位，瓦解敌军防线，在回合耗尽前直取怪物水晶！

4703490.title: 矿业帝国 Demo
4703490.short_description: 在《矿业帝国》中，你将从基础采矿开始，不断开采资源、升级和部署装备，实现矿场全自动运转。利用炸药突破深层矿脉，解锁转生强化与高阶科技，持续扩大你的产业版图，最终建立属于自己的矿业帝国

4713640.title: Heavy Mental: A Co-op Action Roguelite Demo
4713640.short_description: 体验3D横版射击的混乱快感！你可以扮演机械改造人徒步作战，也可以驾驶配备模块化拖车的铁蛇坦克。一路横扫双持武器的老奶奶，征服5座巨大的堡垒。在这款高能合作动作Roguelite游戏中，使用卡牌进行升级。

4701800.title: Keystones: Foundations Demo
4701800.short_description: 《Keystones》是一款专注于空间推理的烧脑3D益智游戏。通过滑动、旋转和翻滚来操纵体素方块，解决复杂的网格挑战。在极简且充满氛围的世界中，掌握移动与方向的逻辑，开辟前行的道路。

4464330.title: Edentopia Demo
4464330.short_description: An open-world sandbox RPG where every weapon transforms how you fight. Hunt monsters, craft gear from their materials, and shape your build through stats, enchantment, spells, and pets. Explore freely, challenge bosses at your own pace, and carve your own path through a world of magic and discovery.

4639810.title: Drown World Demo
4639810.short_description: Drown World 将网格挖掘与像素级元素模拟相结合。挖掘资源、在飞艇上升级装备，在动荡的地下世界中开凿前行，寻找失落已久的矮人遗迹——而你身后留下的隧道，正被汹涌的洪水一寸寸淹没。

4713400.title: Throne of Shards Demo
4713400.short_description: A dark TCG where you explore a massive dungeon, collect cards, and fight brutal battles. Each floor introduces its own unique rules, twisting the experience in this classic card adventure.

4570280.title: Glorpotron Demo
4570280.short_description: 一款结合塔防与 Roguelike 元素的游戏，主题围绕机器人与黏液。支持单人或本地多人游玩，守护果冻冻，击败咕噜怪。

4435390.title: LOGBOOK: Beneath the Storm Demo
4435390.short_description: A narrative deduction game where you uncover a dark maritime mystery by piecing together clues and hidden connections. Step into the role of a detective, reconstruct past events, identify those involved, and reveal the truth behind a series of grim incidents at sea.

4700770.title: Whose Story (아무개전) Demo
4700770.short_description: A Korean-style action roguelike featuring fast-paced combat, procedurally generated dungeons, and deadly supernatural foes. Each run offers new challenges in a dark fantasy world.

4673620.title: Textvas Demo
4673620.short_description: This is the demo version of Textvas. It is intended to let you check system compatibility and try out the gameplay, so some features differ from the full version. The save function and some other features are unavailable in this demo.

4245150.title: Wizard Confidential Demo
4245150.short_description: Sling spells and crack the case in a city full of bootleggers, corrupt cops, and vampires. Can you save your partner before a wizard dooms Seattle? A text-based interactive urban fantasy noir novel.

4609750.title: Rewindead Demo
4609750.short_description: Rewindead is a third-person shooter blending brutal action with time-looping puzzle mechanics. Assassinate your target, rewind time, then hunt your past selves before they beat you to the kill.

4583460.title: DreadOut 2 Publisher Demo
4583460.short_description: A third-person survival horror demo from DreadOut 2's earliest days. Step into an alternate vision of the series, heavier on gothic action, before the game became the DreadOut 2 you know today.

4593050.title: The Amazing Bird Miner Demo
4593050.short_description: The Amazing Bird Miner is a unique incremental game where you mine ore and capture birds to live with you in your bird grotto. Equip and upgrade your gear to become a better miner. Scavenge for materials and choose your specialization as you save the planet as The Amazing Bird Miner!

4122500.title: KASAP Demo
4122500.short_description: Kasap —— 一款设定在1990年代土耳其的心理惊悚游戏。 深夜，一家老旧的肉铺仍在悄然营业。寡言的屠夫处理着每日的工作，但隐藏在店铺背后的黑暗秘密，正逐渐浮出水面。经营这家肉铺，同时直面你内心深处的过往。

4711840.title: Voxel Shooter Demo
4711840.short_description: 1–4人沙发合作 Roguelite 射击游戏。试玩版：四种元素、90+ 项升级、10个飞升层级中的前4个。完整版将于2026年7月发售。

4715220.title: R.I.P. Demo
4715220.short_description: A co-op horror game where you manipulate your own gravity to traverse a procedurally generated 3D maze with a monster. Work alone or with your team to rescue the Inverted in the first 3 levels of the game R.I.P.

4448580.title: Cozy Mining Demo
4448580.short_description: 常驻桌面的治愈系放置挖矿游戏。只需点击，角色就会自动移动、挖掘、回收。锻造镐头，装备饰品强化属性，收集可爱的动物矿工，让地面热闹起来。永久升级让你越玩越强。工作学习间隙瞥一眼，都能感受温暖。按你的节奏，一起向1000层进发。⛏️✨

4696070.title: Lapistasia Demo
4696070.short_description: Understand in 3 minutes, addicted for 100 hours! Your board is your engine. Lapistasia merges block puzzles with roguelike deckbuilding. Craft ultimate synergies with relics to trigger explosive chain reactions. Break the rules and build the perfect combo. Can you hit 1,000,000+ damage?

4664160.title: Fixer Undercover Demo
4664160.short_description: Unscrew ventilation panels, reroute circuits, and dismantle security systems using nothing but hand tools and logic. Fixer Undercover is a spy-themed puzzle game that puts a screwdriver in your hand instead of a gun. Think like a repairman. Infiltrate like a spy. Demo – Chapter 1 of 7.

4727900.title: Swing Dynasty: College Tennis Demo
4727900.short_description: An unrivaled college tennis video game. Play as a Men’s or Women’s Tennis coach, take control of a team, recruit players, develop your roster, and compete for national championships. Build a college tennis dynasty and become a legend!

4711760.title: Astronine Demo
4711760.short_description: 一款融合九宫格空间策略与卡牌构筑的Roguelike游戏。将卡牌放入3×3星盘，通过位置与组合触发连锁反应，构筑专属套路，在不断变化的局势中打出爆发性得分，体验如同拼接星座般的策略乐趣。

4640250.title: Instruments of Power Demo
4640250.short_description: Prime the battlefield with the spells you built. Consume what you laid down to summon an army of your selves, then strike the shadows before your tether to this world gives out. A turn-based tactical RPG where every spell you cast is one you built, and every summon is a choice.

4655200.title: CHOMP CHOMP Carnage Demo
4655200.short_description: 吃掉一切。变得巨大。海洋从没看起来如此温馨又致命。 一款鱼吃鱼的街机咀嚼游戏，每个生物都由羊毛制成。在 CHOMP CHOMP Carnage 中，沿着食物链一路吞噬前进。

4668380.title: Industronaut Demo
4668380.short_description: 在 Industronaut 的最初数小时中生存下来。建造基础居住舱，生产氧气、水和食物，开采最初的资源，并在宇航服失效前开始自动化生产。

4630230.title: Momo Don't Leave Demo
4630230.short_description: 《Momo Don't Leave》试玩版短篇体验，聚焦氛围与记忆……回到那座从未改变的小镇，遇见那个本不该出现在那里的人。

4521640.title: 镐定星矿 体验版 / Orebits Demo
4521640.short_description: 增量×挖矿×科幻！一把镐子，从手动敲击，到舰队碾压！指数级成长，每一秒都在变强！闯入异常矿区，挖出失落古物——不断深入，不断膨胀，直到宇宙里再也没有你凿不开的秘密！

4223590.title: 魅魔幸存者
4223590.short_description: 魔界三姐妹准备入侵人界！操作9位魅魔，消灭从四面八方蜂拥而至的敌人吧！灵活搭配各类技能的爽快肉鸽动作游戏，总共收录了48个场景和27套动画！

4662900.title: Sic Bo Macau: The Ultimate Casino Dice Game
4662900.short_description: Casino-grade Sic Bo simulator with real payout tables — Standard, Macau, Atlantic City, Australia, and Super with multipliers up to 1000×. Infinite virtual chips, zero microtransactions. Built for players who want to learn strategy, test variance, or just roll the dice in peace.

4619670.title: Cyberpunk Neon Survivor
4619670.short_description: A top-down roguelike bullet-hell survivor where you pilot a cybernetic mech-dog against endless swarms of rogue cats. Dash, blast, and stack augments into game-breaking builds across 60 waves, persistent nemeses, and epic boss fights — then die, upgrade, and deploy again.

4642610.title: Deephold
4642610.short_description: A tactical dwarven tower defense. Forge runes onto 7 tower types, unlock commander skills, and hold your gates through 12 campaign levels and an endless gauntlet. No ads, no micro-transactions, no always-online. Buy once, play forever.

4626410.title: 开局养成满级修士
4626410.short_description: 🌱 养一群个性修仙者 搭配各式法器与法术神通，塑造每个修士独一无二的战斗流派。 壮大你的宗门势力，不断扩张领地版图。 自由改造地图地形。既可降下灭世灾劫，也能为麾下生灵赐予神物至宝，深刻影响世间所有生灵与势力。 ✨ 玩的就是天道模拟器

4384820.title: Global Football
4384820.short_description: Global Football is a multiplayer football game focused on real skill, teamwork, and identity. Here, each player controls a single athlete on the field — not an entire team. No pay-to-win. No scripts. Victory depends solely on your game awareness, technique, and team chemistry.

4466620.title: SiNiSistar 2
4466620.short_description: 化身退魔修女，踏足正在灭亡的异世界。以精致的像素画绘制而成的末日般的世界。恶心恐怖地蠕动着的异形怪物。然后是无数次阻挡住主角的强大boss——描绘抵抗着破灭与绝望，祓除污秽的修女的冒险的暗黑动作RPG。

4686990.title: Dead Spell
4686990.short_description: Dead Spell is an open-world fantasy RPG focused on exploration, magic, progression, and adventure. Explore, craft powerful magical spells, complete epic quests, adventure into dangerous dungeons, battle bosses, and discover rare items!

4577630.title: My Scout Life
4577630.short_description: 发现隐藏的天才，挖掘他们的潜力，在最佳时机将其出售。在《My Scout Life》中，你就是球探——在所有人之前找到年轻的天才球员。建立你的声誉，主宰转会市场！

4588370.title: Seed Defender
4588370.short_description: Click your way to victory in this tower defense strategy game. Swarmed by chickens trying to steal your hard-earned seeds, click them to death and collect their feathers. Then, purchase defenses with those feathers to fend off the hoards that are to come.

3255170.title: Dream Doctor
3255170.short_description: Dream Doctor is a platformer BOSS RUSH where you take on the role of a "psychologist", capable of entering your patients' dreams to confront their worst nightmares through brute force.

4673130.title: Simple Fantasy
4673130.short_description: Hi this game is my attempt at an amalgamation of puzzle solving. Turn-Based Combat with Decision Based Progression, Open World Non-Linear Exploration Quests and Collectables. Save Anywhere. Collect creatures for a game inside a game.

3133650.title: 钱钱向钱冲
3133650.short_description: 钱就是万能的。拥抱城市建设的混沌。饲养巨型怪物！观察弱小的冒险家们！用强大的法术和大自然最伟大的力量——金钱，让大自然顺从你的意愿。

3990570.title: The Melty Way
3990570.short_description: 你移动，你融化。操控一个被模拟为真实液体的史莱姆，每一次移动都会消耗自身的一部分。利用质量滑行、缩小并突破像素级危险，在这款强调体型管理的精准平台游戏中生存。

4624790.title: Lost Totem Trajipon!
4624790.short_description: Capture, command, and sacrifice occult mutants in a delightfully desolate, ultra-morbid turn-based RPG! It'll take a true Minion Master to unravel the treachery that's tying up Trajipon in this entirely above-board ROM we found at a garage sale!

4459140.title: No One Left To Die
4459140.short_description: A generation ship with an unclear objective, housing an expendable crew tasked with waking up passengers to complete the mission... No One Left To Die is a short, sci-fi, action-puzzle-platformer that can be completed solo or with friends in a nuanced cooperative and competitive environment.

4620720.title: Tank POV
4620720.short_description: You play as a little tank in a psychological horror game set in a bizarre world where tanks can devour each other, and are even treated as meat. Grilled, cooked, and served like ordinary food.

4705550.title: 无尽贪吃蛇
4705550.short_description: 这是一款轻松的贪吃蛇游戏，直到你选择挑战自己。先在 Endless 里放松游玩，再用连击、危险路线、Two-Body 控制、Strategist 规划、成长构筑、每日挑战、10 个 Boss 和 100 个成就考验自己。

4519280.title: Deep in the Fields
4519280.short_description: With no other option, you take a job as a farmhand on a remote ranch in the interior of Buenos Aires. But as time passes, you begin to uncover the dark secrets buried deep in the fields.

3460440.title: Only Up: Chan Chained Together
3460440.short_description: Only Up: Chans Together 是一款考验策略、合作精神与团队配合的游戏。只有那些愿意完全信任伙伴的玩家，才能成功登顶，赢得自由。你能证明自己值得获得那把通往巅峰的钥匙吗？

4504430.title: Crab Kingdom
4504430.short_description: The crab king needs your help to protect his treasure in this underwater tower defense!

4630110.title: Corp.S.E.: Escape
4630110.short_description: Witness your friend’s death and inherit a final mission. Trapped inside a deadly corporation, fight, hack, and solve your way through a heavily guarded facility to escape and uncover the truth. A fast-paced 2D action platformer filled with combat and puzzles.

4223860.title: 神经连接
4223860.short_description: 踏入一个微观世界，神经元在其中漂浮跳动。连接突触，引导递质，塑造网络流动。观察递质沿路径流动，点亮回路，神经世界将在你的连接下轻轻低语、焕发生机。

4268430.title: Midnight Kebab
4268430.short_description: 你经营一家深夜餐厅，通过神秘机器控制辐射，影响顾客的味觉和行为。信号过弱真相显现，过强则引发疾病、攻击和调查。保持平衡，才能继续营业。

4560920.title: Bounce on it!
4560920.short_description: Bounce and roll through the world of mazes and courses. Try to make it to the end, but you can't move in the air even though you build momentum for when you hit the ground.

4380000.title: 咖啡店革命 | Cafe Revolution
4380000.short_description: 经营你自己的咖啡馆！接收顾客订单，冲煮美味咖啡，服务顾客，并将你的咖啡店发展成镇上最棒的去处。

4117320.title: Drive Together
4117320.short_description: 一辆车。多名驾驶员。毫无配合。 《Drive Together》是一款混乱的多人合作竞速游戏，每位玩家将操控同一辆车的不同部位。与好友沟通、配合，共同完成赛道挑战。

3035960.title: Augment Anthem
3035960.short_description: Combine four Augment types to transform your gun, movement, and traversal in a 2D sci-fi metroidvania. Explore interconnected environments from flooded ruins to abandoned bunkers, fight biomechanical threats, and rebuild the last human settlement.

4290890.title: Boba Buba
4290890.short_description: BobaBuba Is the Boba Bubble-Pop Puzzle Adventure with story mode featuring cute beverages and an endless mode for huge replay value. With global leaderboards from launch!

4578650.title: Ten Rings 1
4578650.short_description: 《十戒》是一款回合制 RPG。你的角色可以同时装备十枚戒指，并通过戒指获得属性、技能和被动效果。挑战敌人、赚取金币、购买新戒指，组合出属于自己的战斗流派。

3657180.title: Skigill
3657180.short_description: Fight! Collect! Explore! Experiment! Survive! Master the SKIGILL, a large skill tree spanning the entire battleground, to power your character and survive waves of enemies. Unlock upgrades, weapons, and characters in a meta sigil after each game, and maybe you'll see the end!

3987160.title: Aetherbreak
3987160.short_description: In this fast-paced, 3D first-person platformer, soar through the air as Velos, an angel attempting to prove his worth and break free from the aether by overcoming a gauntlet of challenges. Players speed across platforms, navigating obstacles as quickly as possible in order to escape purgatory.

3325020.title: Nightmariners
3325020.short_description: NightMariners 是一款合作恐怖冒险游戏。你将航行于黑暗海域，探索被诅咒的岛屿，并进入危险的洞穴

4362760.title: The Forgotten Nightmare Series
4362760.short_description: A classic-style text adventure game spanning three chapters. Enter verb/noun commands via keyboard, mouse, or game controller to explore, collect items, and solve puzzles in a post-apocalyptic, Christian-themed story. Features an auto-drawing map and hint system.

4539950.title: Unanswered
4539950.short_description: 你在一个陌生的地方醒来，不知道自己是谁、身在何处，也不知道是如何来到这里的。你被困在一个不断扭曲、企图摧毁你理智的环境中，唯一的出路就是深入未知，直面你大脑极力想要隐藏的骇人过往。

3689030.title: Blueblood Arena
3689030.short_description: Simple controls, premium gameplay! Blueblood Arena features a variety of characters with wildly different playstyles, with a free-flowing combo structure where anything is possible!

1449700.title: Soul Machine
1449700.short_description: 组装你的终极机甲，迎战成群的机器人。在这款狂热的双摇杆肉鸽射击游戏中，组合毁灭性的武器，创造协同效应，收集零件以在“虫群”中生存。你的底盘能撑得住吗？

4621860.title: Invasion of the Lizard People
4621860.short_description: 1–4 player co-op survival where you fight through waves of enemies, rack up kills, and collect powerful pickups to stay alive as long as possible. Fast-paced, chaotic runs push your limits every time.

4360180.title: Push The Cart Together
4360180.short_description: 货物已装好，推车已就绪，客户正在等待。独自一人或与朋友一起，把货物推到终点。 物理规则和世界都不会对你友好。货物会多次爆炸——你们也是。 这会非常困难，但别担心……总有一天会成功的。对吧？

4355340.title: Durak Online by Pokerist
4355340.short_description: Play the best Durak Online game with real players for free! Invite friends, choose your game mode, and enjoy fantastic graphics on any device.

4686320.title: Žolík
4686320.short_description: Classic Central European card game brought to Steam. Build melds, race to empty your hand, and outscore your friends. 2–4 players over Steam, or solo against AI bots. Three rule presets, custom rules, full Slovak + English.

3523750.title: 与舰同沉
3523750.short_description: 在这款战略自走棋中设计一艘武装到牙齿的太空战舰。挑选超过 200 种物品，装备船体，并在异步 PvP 中释放它的火力。组合舰长与派系，打造离谱组合并制霸银河。重掷、购买、放置、祈祷。

3554150.title: Anomaly Jobs : Data Center
3554150.short_description: You work the nightshift at Data Center DC4-31. Something is off this time. Spot the anomaly, take the correct exit multiple times in a row and finish your shift.

4396370.title: Galaxy Grinder Incremental
4396370.short_description: Galaxy Grinder 是一款快节奏的增量游戏，您可以使用光标和武器摧毁行星和小行星。赚取资源，解锁新世界，并在每次运行之间通过升级、技能和强化变得更强。

4073090.title: Shout League
4073090.short_description: 欢迎来到 Shout League —— 一款你必须对着麦克风对球大喊的足球游戏！和朋友一起大喊，对朋友大喊，随便大喊！在线游玩，组队并进球！

4359120.title: Karkaba
4359120.short_description: Choose from 10 iconic Middle Eastern fighters and battle across legendary Arab stages. Karkaba is a deep, skill based fighting game featuring smooth 60 FPS combat, rollback netcode online multiplayer, local battles with friends, and competitive online play.

2590410.title: Furry Necromancer 💀
2590410.short_description: You died, but I got good news and bad news for you. The good news - you have been resurrected, the bad news - you have been resurrected by a necromancer who has some "special" plans for you (although it might not be "bad news" at all...)

4607520.title: Leafy Greenz
4607520.short_description: Leafy Greenz is a game where you play as Leafy, who gets eaten by a Koala. You must make your way throughout the digestive tract of the Koala, playing through a series of minigames and attempting to achieve a high score.

4591720.title: Liminal Sick Pizza Blue
4591720.short_description: 制作披萨，送去外卖。单人轮班这份工作的痛苦之处，就在于送餐地点竟然是“边缘空间”……！一款重视剧情的3D恐怖游戏。只有在无限空间中才会诞生的“最坏之物”存在着。你知道那是什么吗？等你明白的时候，一切都已经太迟了。

3602030.title: Steel Artery: Train City Builder
3602030.short_description: 在这款蒸汽朋克幻想风格的列车城市建造游戏中，打造一座在轨道上奔行的活力都市。管理拥有数千名自主公民的多种族殖民地，平衡他们的需求，经营经济，规划物流，并探索遥远的地区，以确保帝国的繁荣。

3922090.title: Centipede Simulator
3922090.short_description: Experience life as a centipede! Munch on crickets to grow longer and evade deadly predators in a frantic struggle for survival across multiple game modes. How long can you last?

4664970.title: Hyperwurm is back!
4664970.short_description: 一台赛博蠕虫引擎在致命迷宫中咆哮前进。 引导不断成长的生物穿过狭窄走廊，并偶尔面对 Boss —— 使用鼠标、手柄或键盘 ……或者让 AI 代理接管控制。

3826060.title: Moventure
3826060.short_description: 100种动作，2个按键，0教程。 掌握隐藏在方向键和2个按键中的庞大动作库。在终极movelike高精度平台游戏中征服100+关卡。

4670730.title: 液态围棋
4670730.short_description: 如果棋子能够任意摆放，围棋将会是什么样的？传统的定势还成立吗？如何做眼？进攻/防守是否更容易/困难了？这款游戏能够满足你的所有好奇心。来玩《液态围棋》，感受不一样的围棋体验！

4579170.title: Dungeons of Freeport
4579170.short_description: A Daily Extraction Roguelike Dungeon-Crawler. Play the same dungeons as everyone else, once a day. Select your gear and delve into dungeons, attempting to escape with the loot you obtain. Inspired by classical roguelikes of decades past, but with a modern interface and metagame.

4556720.title: Team Flashy Virus
4556720.short_description: Slow down time, defy gravity, and weave through the chaos as you bounce off bullets and enemies to survive. You are one shot, but not weaponless.

4391540.title: Console Cafe Simulator
4391540.short_description: 设置游戏机，管理游戏，设定价格，为顾客提供服务，雇佣员工，发展你的咖啡馆，成为城市中最受欢迎的游戏中心

4527970.title: The Anomaly Inspector
4527970.short_description: You're an Anomaly Inspector working the night shift at a remote facility. Walk through each area, report what's wrong at the terminal—or report that everything is clear. But as the night progresses, the anomalies become harder to ignore. Can you survive until morning?

3708060.title: Boogie Fungi
3708060.short_description: Build and maintain a colony of Mushrooms, keep them happy with constant parties and make sure to deploy some defenses to deal with foragers

4182000.title: 服务区模拟器
4182000.short_description: 从一个小型路边站开始，发展成大型服务区。补充货架、销售燃料、经营餐厅和汽车旅馆，并保持环境整洁高效。通过合理管理，将小生意发展成热门目的地！

4341480.title: Last Known Vector
4341480.short_description: Last Known Vector is a sci-fi horror game where you travel between a space station and SOS signals. Your aging ship often breaks down, so keep it in good condition. But failures aren’t your only threat. In space, anomalies appear, and when they do, avoid the darkness at all costs.

2629230.title: The Adventures of Sir Kicksalot
2629230.short_description: 这是一款第一人称动作游戏，你可以通过多种方式击败敌人：无论是武器、法术、潜行，还是使用战术将他们一脚踢进致命尖刺。

4681200.title: Severed Light
4681200.short_description: SEVERED LIGHT is an ARPG where you slay demons, Battle epic bosses, then go fishing and find the perfect spot for your house plant. Loot, explore, quest, kill and chill... in no specific order.

4663060.title: The Haunted Spot 2
4663060.short_description: The Haunted Spot is a 2D top-down survival horror game based on the story of a paranormal enthusiast called Jack who arrived at a century-old abandoned haunted house to experience the paranormal.

4663010.title: Entiled
4663010.short_description: Entiled is an infinite spatial tile clearing puzzle game built for endless replayability. Clear tiles without collisions, build massive multipliers, compete on Steam Leaderboards, and create, share, and play community made puzzles through the Steam Workshop. Climb the Ranked Steam Leaderboards.

3521220.title: Nano Squadron
3521220.short_description: Manage your shields, evolve your ship, defend Earth. Nano Squadron is a top-down space roguelite where every run brings new upgrades and every mistake leaves you exposed.

4541390.title: That's An Order Ensign
4541390.short_description: Complete a slew of mundane and dangerous tasks, Do it quick or you're dismissed! Try to stay alive, but do your job. Because after all... That's an order, ensign!

3950510.title: XorO
3950510.short_description: "XorO" is a 1vs1 fighting-inspired puzzle game that puts focus on the mind games by getting rid of mechanical, input-based complexity while also having a set of simple, easy to understand rules derived from familiar ideas of tic-tac-toe and rock-paper-scissors.

4662430.title: Blind Savior
4662430.short_description: In a game without graphics where sound is everything, you must reach a man amongst a spreading fire without being burned alive.

4628500.title: Dungeon of Calibris: Demon Orb
4628500.short_description: Descend into a sprawling, perilous dungeon in this old‑school first‑person RPG. Build your party, uncover hidden rooms, battle deadly creatures, and meet a large cast of adventurers trying to survive the depths. Designed with the spirit of classic “dad‑era” dungeon crawlers.

4655400.title: 'In You We Trust, Not Algorithms' ~Newbie Matsumoto's Manual Elevator Operation with Sticky Notes~
4655400.short_description: A hyper-stressful, strictly manual elevator simulation! You're the corporation's new "control system" (a human). Drag and drop sticky notes to transport employees. Amidst massive clock-out rushes and blaring complaints, can you survive this extreme one-man shift?!

4618090.title: Backrooms: The Last Observer
4618090.short_description: Backrooms: The Last Observer is a cooperative horror game. Descend into something that resists understanding, where perception itself begins to fracture. You are here not to fight, but to witness — and sometimes, witnessing is the worst thing you can do.

4591700.title: VamPigo
4591700.short_description: Collect special Vampig creatures, use their elemental charge-carrying abilities to solve puzzles, fight factory robots, avoid security traps and defeat the evil Manager within the walls of a vampire weapons factory.

3595320.title: 遗忘清单
3595320.short_description: 忘记，还是留下？ 这是一款用声音和回忆叙事的游戏。当你在现实中闭上眼睛，游戏中的记忆就会渐渐清晰。主人公将如何面对过去？她的结局只在你一念之间。

4506500.title: Dunjourney
4506500.short_description: Dunjourney is a pixel-art, time-limited, turn-based roguelike RPG. Explore an ever-changing labyrinth filled with diverse events. Strengthen your character with abundant loot, push your strategy to the limit, and defeat the formidable bosses lurking in the depths!

4669230.title: Traders Life Together
4669230.short_description: Start your supermarket business and make your own trading Journey! With Co-op support Play solo or team up with friends, featuring over 300 items you can make your dream store, the enjoy it with your friends!

3895090.title: Evil Doll 2
3895090.short_description: You awaken, trapped in a dark, blood-stained house. A terrifying puppet hunts you. Solve puzzles, find tools, and unlock the front door to escape. But be quiet, it hears everything. Uncover the house's dark secrets before the Evil Doll finds you.

4645490.title: Skrrt Racing
4645490.short_description: Race through stylized old school arcade levels, unlock JDM inspired cars and upgrade performance parts, visual evolution and customization. Beat bosses, evolve your build, and push into infinite mode in this fully offline 2D racing game.

4613260.title: Total RepeAt
4613260.short_description: Sci-fi survival shooter. The ship is wrecked. you are alone 340,000 colonists disappeared. Repair your ship before the VOID fleet arrives - and uncover a secret the UEF would kill to bury.

4279980.title: PlayZone
4279980.short_description: PlayZone是一款多人派对游戏，集合多种经典玩法与社交互动，轻松有趣，支持个性化装扮和奖励系统，快来和朋友一起玩吧！

4629780.title: Catniss around the world
4629780.short_description: Jump into a beautifully crafted adventure starring Catniss! Experience smooth, traditional 2D animation brought to life inside immersive 3D environments. Run, leap, and explore vibrant side-scrolling worlds full of charm and challenge.

3835590.title: Halls of Nyarlathotep
3835590.short_description: Explore the shifting labyrinths of the Dreamlands in this Lovecraftian roguelite FPS, where every shot, step, and secret chips away at your sanity as you face eldritch horrors and ancient Outer Gods.

4677460.title: Stealth Operative Syn: Virtual Training Demo
4677460.short_description: Synthia “Syn” is training to become a Stealth Operative. In order to do so, she trains in the Virtual Simulation Room. Use different tactics and techniques to sneak past the guards and obstacles. Finish every level to complete your virtual training!

4670150.title: 无菌童年
4670150.short_description: 医院曾经把你写成病例。现在，你要找回被删掉的人生。

4641480.title: CATS BLOCKS: HOT SPRINGS Demo
4641480.short_description: A cozy cat puzzle game where you arrange fluffy block-shaped kitties into a relaxing hot spring resort. Rotate and place them in 90 handcrafted levels to unlock their happy reactions.

4051220.title: Evil Pongon Game Demo
4051220.short_description: A fast-paced 2D platformer where you dash, wall-jump, and speedrun through levels while avoiding enemies that steal your riches. Shatter hourglasses to trigger countdown escapes from the wall-phasing ENPHOSO, and face bosses in Undertale-style bullet-hell battles.

4730730.title: Capybara: The Great Journey Demo
4730730.short_description: 4人合作农场冒险。控制水豚和动物伙伴拯救破产家园！种植、修理、升级、工作，从森林探索到城市，为农夫偿还债务！

4442200.title: Lost Diver Demo
4442200.short_description: A homeless man finds a treasure map on the beach, sparking a new life. Dive into the deep to find valuable sunken objects, upgrade your gear—including your metal detector, oar, and oxygen tube—and uncover hidden mini-maps to find even greater treasures in this relaxing simulation game.

4654660.title: 键盘侠：键入即毁灭 Demo
4654660.short_description: 在璀璨星空与流星雨中快速键入，毁灭下落的字母！掌握主动技能与标记系统，触发爆炸、冰缓、额外加分等华丽特效.

4692800.title: Shear Heaven Demo
4692800.short_description: A young soul lands in Heaven by chance, but he doesn't belong here. To find his way home, he'll need wool. A lot of wool! Shear Heaven is a cozy 3D voxel platformer set among floating sky islands; a playground built for wonder, fluffy sheep, and finding your way back to the people you love.

4713460.title: Manaclysm Demo
4713460.short_description: Manaclysm is a PvP brawler where up to 60 mages wage war across realms fractured by magic. Slay enemy mages to upgrade your mana and spell arsenal. Invite friends to a private game, or hop into ranked matchmaking for some massive brawls! This demo has full online multiplayer limited to 8 players.

4572750.title: The Watching Woods: The Friend Demo
4572750.short_description: 为了融入新学校，索尼娅结识了一群自称为乡村女巫的女孩。在完成她们交予的任务时，她发现这些任务一次比一次离奇、诡异和残酷。为了被接纳，她究竟会走多远？

4629250.title: Lost Totem Trajipon: Homecoming
4629250.short_description: Explore the ultra-frightening outskirts of Trajipon in this short but cryptic adventure! Find your car keys - if you can stomach the gruesome beings standing in your way.

4619250.title: 亚洲家长的上学之路 - 试玩版
4619250.short_description: 一款1-4人的在线联机合作冒险游戏。带你沉浸式体验亚洲父母当年上学路上的“史诗级”劫难。痛扁精神病黑熊，无视物理定律，还要挺过来自NPC“Tablo Escobar”的“精神暴击”——只要你一失败，他就会对你疯狂输出、无情吐槽！

4362720.title: Shroomveil Demo
4362720.short_description: Shroomveil is a real-time combat, Action RPG, with character progression, skills, and gear upgrades. Set in a magical, mushroom-filled world full of danger and discovery, you'll explore a beautiful fantasy land, find and defend villages, equip warriors, clear dungeons, defeat bosses, and bring peace

4696350.title: Pack my Order Demo
4696350.short_description: Pack My Order is a cozy online shopping simulator. Fill your cart based on the customers' lists and budgets, and enjoy the process without any rush. Cute animations, pleasant sounds, and a calm pace await you. No timers — the perfect way to clear your mind after a long day.

4605150.title: RIPCORE Demo
4605150.short_description: 杀戮。进化。循环。 在这款高能 Roguelike FPS 中战翻地狱 9 层。通过叠加升级打造逆天 Build，粉碎成千上万的恶魔并击败传奇 BOSS。地狱已满——开工清理。

4668650.title: Mutation Demo
4668650.short_description: 当主角从梦中醒来时，一切都变了，他将独自对抗一整所庄园的行尸走肉，并发掘其背后的惊天秘密。

4605250.title: My Little Ocean Demo
4605250.short_description: 潜入互动式的海洋模拟世界。引领你的鱼群寻找食物与安全地带，观察它们嬉戏漫游，在这片温馨的小小海洋中共同享受欢乐时光。

4458620.title: Dread Eagle - Prologue
4458620.short_description: 被苏联士兵绑架后，你被带到秘密设施 Unit 91-C 进行未知实验。这里面出了可怕的问题。探索废弃的设施，学习游戏机制，并在潜伏其中的恐怖中生存下来。游玩 Dread Eagle 的教程序章，独自一人或与朋友一起。

4304000.title: KharkivVision 2035 Demo
4304000.short_description: This is an atmospheric demo version of the narrative indie game KharkivVision 2035 with open-world elements, dedicated to relocation, change, and a look into the future.

4716790.title: Jackpot Colosseum Demo
4716790.short_description: Step into the arena in this fast-paced roguelike deckbuilder! Instead of cards, you build the ultimate deadly slot machine. Draft unique symbols, trigger massive synergy combos, and survive endless waves of gladiators. Spin the reels, scale the Bronze League, and break the bank!

4701760.title: Broadside Bets Demo
4701760.short_description: This isn't a casino. This is war! Command the crew, upgrade your deck and collect rule-bending Booty. Discover devastating combinations and destroy your enemies as you navigate a branching map full of encounters, islands and treasure.

4575090.title: Quod Erat Demonstrandum Demo
4575090.short_description: Discover the challenging fun of validating logical proofs, beginning with simple propositional calculus and ending with complex, multi-domain propositional calculus. Prove yourself to be a master of logical thinking!

3373600.title: There's Always a Madman: V.I.C.T.O.R. Demo
3373600.short_description: Secret agent Franklin Benjamin will stop at nothing to save the world. In this single-player interactive spy novel, you play as his greatest adversaries - can the criminal enterprise known as V.I.C.T.O.R. defeat the only man standing between them and world domination? To the VICTOR go the spoils!

4512960.title: Star Raker Demo
4512960.short_description: Welcome to Star Raker, a multiplayer social deduction for 4 to 12 players. Take part in a psychological experiment aboard an evacuation ship. Use logic, communication, and social engineering to save the gene pool or survive the paranoia of hidden betrayal.

4716760.title: Hamstr Protocol Demo
4716760.short_description: This free demo gives you a taste of the full Hamstr Protocol experience. Set up your first rig, get your hamster running, and mine your first HAM. The operation starts small — but the potential is anything but.

4688250.title: SHULERO – Dice Roguelike Demo
4688250.short_description: 受 Yacht 启发的 Roguelike（快艇骰子）。掷骰子。打造组合。击败 Boss。作弊才能赢。

4683910.title: Blau Demo
4683910.short_description: A relaxing ocean tile builder where you grow a living ecosystem, while keeping its fragile balance alive. Expand across diverse sea biomes, harness ocean currents, and build a world that can sustain itself.

4481220.title: Blueblood Arena Demo
4481220.short_description: Simple controls, premium gameplay! Blueblood Arena features a variety of characters with wildly different playstyles, with a free-flowing combo structure where anything is possible!

4697340.title: MayDay MayDie Demo
4697340.short_description: 最多支持8人的实时背叛与行动游戏。乘客全力完成任务以求迫降，而潜伏的劫机者则暗中破坏，企图让飞机坠毁。没有投票，只有纯粹的猜忌与疯狂！

4657400.title: Nova Fleet Demo
4657400.short_description: A short incremental space game about building and expanding a mining fleet. Destroy asteroids, collect resources, and upgrade your ships to mine faster and extract more with every run.

4487420.title: The Bed Above My Head Demo
4487420.short_description: You’re playing a game in the dark. Something in your room is not. In this Sit & Survive type psychological horror game, you're a child playing on your console, while something roams your room. Observe your surroundings, listen carefully and manage your stress to survive this nightmarish night.

4719860.title: 乒乓行 Demo
4719860.short_description: 这是一款乒乓球运动题材的弹幕射击肉鸽游戏。玩家穿越至古代神魔世界，以球拍为武器，通过乒乓球攻击敌人，并需拾回乒乓球才能再次进攻，形成独特战斗节奏。游戏包含随机怪物的关卡，还包含篝火与商店系统，可构筑多样流派。乒乓球运动与神魔元素融合，带来新颖战斗体验。

4705030.title: Dohyo Dreams: Rise to Yokozuna Demo
4705030.short_description: Rise from unknown newcomer to Yokozuna in a story-rich RPG where stable life, rivalry, and ritual are just as brutal as the clay.

4661580.title: Sweet Land Survival Demo
4661580.short_description: Sweet Land Survival is a colorful survival game in a world made of sweets! But don't let the cute visuals fool you. The island is treacherous: to survive another day, you'll have to gather resources and fight monsters. Gather a team of loyal companions to make survival more fun!

4446350.title: Pieces of the Kingdom Demo
4446350.short_description: 如果国际象棋...是一款Roguelite呢？集结你的队伍，在这个奇幻战术版国际象棋中杀出一条血路。掠夺史诗装备，招募拥有独特能力的强力棋子，运筹帷幄走向胜利。

4720560.title: Appalachian Onslaught Demo
4720560.short_description: Build, upgrade and defend against an endless onslaught of cryptids being sent to destroy your tribe by the great Appalachian nightmare himself... the Rketari.

4456590.title: Raiders Rise Demo
4456590.short_description: Explore hostile planets, face endless hordes of devourers, collect crystals, and upgrade your equipment. Choose the hero that best suits your playstyle, cooperate with your allies to survive… or betray the other team at the perfect moment and claim victory.

4568930.title: Scientific project: Optic Demo
4568930.short_description: Scientific Project: Optic is a first-person puzzle game that guides you through the history of optical science, from its philosophical origins to our modern understanding. Master the nature of light and solve puzzles inspired by real scientific discoveries.

4700170.title: Pin Money Demo
4700170.short_description: 把一家破旧的霓虹保龄球馆打造成十亿美元的全垒打帝国。叠加荒谬的倍率、解锁强力升级、最多同时经营7条球道，并在这款放置/递增式保龄球游戏中击穿整个经济系统。

4702180.title: a weird game about sausage Demo
4702180.short_description: 这是一个关于香肠的点击游戏

4714760.title: Apotheosis Engine [Demo]
4714760.short_description: A probe, lost in the cosmos awakens after countless years. Using an antiquated retro operating system, grow your probe from a simple piece of engineering to a universal digital deity. Apotheosis Engine is an idle clicker game about becoming a digital GOD.

4661460.title: 5th Dimension Demo
4661460.short_description: Explore the prologue of the upcoming 5th Dimension virtual world like no other. Players compete in a battle for control between the Nuri and the Savi factions as they terraform worlds, build cities and create high-tech robotic humanoids.

4702210.title: Tulip Season Demo
4702210.short_description: 在这款农场模拟游戏中，以郁金香为颜料，以花田为画布，绘制你的策略与休闲之作。规划种植，让所有花和谐排布，在整片花田上构成优雅的样式。不论是每日仔细照料，还是在休闲模式下任其盛放，你的目标很简单：打造值得国王一观的美景。

4698670.title: Samota Demo
4698670.short_description: Samota is a Klondike roguelike deckbuilder. You have one try per round to build the ultimate synergistic stack. Carefully decide which card to combine with which effect, which card to play or keep for later reward, which cover that synergize well, all to make the number goes bigger and bigger!

4726900.title: CrazyDish Demo
4726900.short_description: CrazyDish is a dishwashing simulator where you scrub your way to the top of the Dishwashers' League! Complete challenging contracts using specialized brushes, powerful detergents, and more to dominate the global leaderboards. Ready, set, SCRUB!

4568210.title: Mythic Manager Demo
4568210.short_description: The front office sports experience — but for an MMORPG guild. Scout talent, manage your roster, win arena tournaments, build raid teams, and climb the rankings one boss kill at a time.

4655560.title: The Cradle of Life Demo
4655560.short_description: A brutal turn-based tactical RPG where you fight on a grid, manage hunger and sanity, and uncover a world breaking apart. Your choices are permanent and the gods are always watching. Who will you serve?

4715420.title: ROOTKIT://死 (ROOTKIT PROTOCOL DEATH) Demo
4715420.short_description: Cyberpunk extraction runner with bhop movement. Speed determines whether enemies can hit you. Race your own ghost through gauntlet levels, slide under barriers, chain crouch-bhops on ramps, and extract before the system catches up.

4369630.title: Winemaker Simulator Demo
4369630.short_description: 踏入中世纪地中海，过上酿酒师的生活。从照料葡萄园到收获、酿酒和贸易，每一个决定都塑造着你的工艺。你会创造出最精致、最有价值的葡萄酒吗？🍷

4248200.title: Cloudbreaker Demo
4248200.short_description: Cloudbreaker is a roguelite, inventory management, survivors-like. Explore a sky-world, finding relics and defeating hordes of enemies. Unlock and upgrade airships, each with its own unique layout, abilities, and strategies, to grow your power over time.

4699870.title: 断光のウルバスティア Demo
4699870.short_description: 断光のウルバスティアはシミュレーションRPGです。隣国や無法者との戦いを描いたダークな世界観のファンタジー、総勢35人の個性豊かな仲間と共に困難を切り開いていきます。デモバージョンでは全15ステージをプレイ可能となっています。

4592660.title: The Devil's Graveyard: A PIGSKIN Demo
4592660.short_description: The Devil’s Graveyard: A PIGSKIN Demo places you in the shoes of Ricky, an angsty teenager dared to spend Halloween night in a haunted cemetery. As he explores Sugarwood Cemetery—known by locals as The Devil’s Graveyard—a reckless challenge turns into a descent into something far more sinister.

4697920.title: AAA海岛热线 Demo
4697920.short_description: 《AAA海岛热线》是一款治愈系桌面放置农场游戏。通过神秘的杂交系统培育独一无二的小动物，每一次诞生都充满惊喜！你还可以种植、采购与装饰岛屿，把它放在桌面一角，静静陪伴你~

4610750.title: Wayward Crown Demo
4610750.short_description: Wayward Crown 试玩版 — 游戏仍在早期开发中，此版本用于收集玩家反馈与建议。内容有限且可能存在 BUG。未来将新增更多冒险者、怪物、建筑与技能。感谢您的试玩与宝贵意见！

4344510.title: Memories Loaming, November
4344510.short_description: A game about possession from the inside. A single player horror/puzzle adventure set in a forgotten stretch of Labrador, Canada. The environments change between visits, rewarding and punishing familiarity. Also, there's a bear. Eventually, you might be remembered too.

4719400.title: MEOWMI: City Cat Chaos Demo
4719400.short_description: 化身一只活泼的小猫，探索温馨的开放世界城市——攀爬屋顶、发现秘密、自定义你的猫咪，并在这个充满魅力的沙盒冒险中帮助朋友。

4566150.title: Imperial Wager: The Shattered Crown of Augustus Demo
4566150.short_description: Rule a dark-age feudal empire in this unconventional grand strategy game. Wager your treasury, manage unruly vassals, and use ancient, unpredictable relics to rig the odds of war. Draft edicts, suppress peasant revolts, and gamble everything to reforge the name of Augustus.

4732910.title: Fluff Up Demo
4732910.short_description: 《Fluff Up》是一款有趣且充满挑战性的游戏，你需要控制好你的速度，管理好你的体力，操控一只小胖鸟穿梭在奇幻的云海，借助一片片云朵飞上最高的天空！

4639190.title: 梦镜冒险者
4639190.short_description: 《梦镜冒险者》是一款在梦镜里战斗,自由探索,寻找宝箱。

4486310.title: 新花结实好时光
4486310.short_description: 你是个充满活力的少年，正准备迎接新的开始！与丰富多彩的市民见面，和周围的人成为朋友，尽情享受丰富多彩的生活！

4710450.title: Overdue Demo
4710450.short_description: Over due is a first person stealth-action shooter where you play as freelance mercenary. What begins as a standard extraction mission spirals into a fight to stop a dictator from erasing memes and controlling free thought. This bite-sized demo serves as the intro to the main game.

4599890.title: 香港恐怖事件：益善楼外卖血案
4599890.short_description: 最后一单外卖，送进了一栋再也走不出去的住宅楼。 你以为只是平凡的工作，却在熟悉的益善楼里，逐渐陷入无法逃脱的噩梦。

4718310.title: 雲海のフロンティア Demo
4718310.short_description: This is the demo version of the classic full-length RPG "Cloudsea Frontier".

3332830.title: 男神模拟器
3332830.short_description: 一名困于现实的青年，意外穿越回学生时代，并觉醒时空恋爱战略系统。 在僚机“童锦程”的辅助下，你将跨越青涩校园与风云职场，用未来记忆改写命运，同时与七位不同人生阶段的女孩展开宿命纠缠—— 从教室到写字楼，从电单车到AMG，见证她们从少女蜕变为行业翘楚，而你能否在时空交错中，找到爱情与事业的最优解？

4726890.title: 搭搭大战 试玩版
4726890.short_description: 《搭搭大战》是一款融合城市经营与即时战略的创新佳作。运筹帷幄间，建筑联动打造繁华都市，兵种搭配组建精锐军团，资源管理与策略对战环环相扣。轻松上手，既能享受经营建设的成就感，也能体验攻城略地的策略快感。

3933330.title: 三国之张角复活
3933330.short_description: 三国之张角复活 - 是一款实时战斗式游戏。可选择单人战斗或招揽人才组成高达十人的队伍。自由学习六种武术与法术，获取五种不同级别的装备。简易却强大的属性系统。

4603810.title: Zenith Expanse Demo
4603810.short_description: Play the opening hour of a living space colony survival sim. Wake your crew, secure water and food, build your first fragile settlements, and survive 50 Sols on a compact 30-star map.

4503170.title: XYLOMETAZOLINE
4503170.short_description: Immerse yourself in the depths of addiction and explore the surreal world of XYLOMETAZOLINE.

4352110.title: Wild Ice Demo
4352110.short_description: Grab your stick, build traps, defend the furnaces, and dangle your way to victory against waves of frost zombies in this hockey-themed tower defense game. Play the first 3 battles, complete a few quests, and unlock 4 traps in the demo.

4514280.title: Welcome, [Employee Name] Demo
4514280.short_description: Welcome, [Employee Name]! You are our new space station controller. We trust you to make all the right decisions and keep the people of the HonkyTonk space station safe. Process as many trucks as possible but be careful, mistakes have consequences. Welcome to the Honky Tonk Family!

3686400.title: Titan Core
3686400.short_description: A free-to-play card battler that’s truly fair—no pay-to-win nonsense. The only randomness? The cards you draw. Everything else comes down to strategy.

4610560.title: The Reflection Demo
