4610560.short_description: The Reflection is a ritual-based co-op horror game where players attempt to exorcise a demonic entity while being relentlessly hunted by it. Investigate cursed locations, perform the correct rituals, stay silent, and work together under pressure — one mistake can mean certain death.

4669500.title: The Eternal Woods Demo
4669500.short_description: The Eternal Woods is a short, fast paced incremental about an adventurer trapped in a never ending Woods. Sharpen your axe, upgrade your skills and conquer the different Forests to escape the Woods!

4644130.title: Sovereign's End Demo
4644130.short_description: A 3D space survivor-like with deep build-crafting. Auto-firing abilities, dozens of synergies, one Sovereign at the end of every run. Few will reach it.

4718870.title: Sky Recoil Demo
4718870.short_description: 《SkyRecoil》是一款快节奏动作游戏。挥舞强力锤子粉碎敌人，利用爆炸产生的后坐力高速穿梭战场，在枪林弹雨中灵活闪避、精准击杀。不断解锁强力改装，打造属于你的战斗风格，变得越来越强！

4628110.title: Sellin' Snake Oil
4628110.short_description: Buy low, sell high, and survive the frontier. Sellin' Snake Oil is a western trading roguelike where every run brings a new map, new prices, new challenges, and new decisions. The ranch won't buy itself.

4584440.title: Offroad Frontiers
4584440.short_description: Offroad Frontiers is an off-road driving experience that combines realistic vehicle physics with vast, immersive environments designed for exploration, challenge, and freedom. Drive your favorite 4x4 vehicle and push it to the limit across different terrains.

4154250.title: No Roads: 4×4 Off-Road Challenge
4154250.short_description: Drive your 4x4 across wild environments and find your own path through mountains, rivers, forests, mud, and rock. Compete for the shortest distance and fastest time while pushing your rig through dangerous off-road terrain. I hope you enjoy finding your own path.

4372240.title: MONOPHOBIA
4372240.short_description: Follow a recluse who is the only being left in the world as she struggles with little things in her everyday life. This game was made entirely out of scanned traditional watercolor art.

4459040.title: Huebound
4459040.short_description: Mix light. Discover color. Idle forever. Place geometric nodes, connect them, and watch colored orbs flow through your factory. Combine primaries to create 256 named colors — each one waiting to be discovered.

4644780.title: Home Defense Zombie War Demo
4644780.short_description: 抵御僵尸，守护你的家园！部署你的英雄，建立防线，并在这个试玩版的生存模式中尽可能长时间地活下去。

4642680.title: Hex Judge Demo
4642680.short_description: 审问村民，揭开隐藏的真相，并在日落前决定谁将接受审判。本作为试玩版。

4646130.title: Green Clicker
4646130.short_description: Click the green square and unlock 100 Steam achievements. Track your progress, build your click streak, and rise from your first click to one million. Simple mechanics, pure satisfaction.

4615420.title: Everburning Dark Demo
4615420.short_description: 合成棋子，击败异变。开口提问，改写旅程。《长夜余烬》是一款结合 2048 式棋盘战斗与 AI 反应式叙事的黑暗幻想 Roguelike。你的对话、选择与构筑，将改变每一轮冒险中的事件、遭遇、同伴关系与隐藏真相。

4717470.title: Enigma Heart Demo
4717470.short_description: Unravel the mysteries of your past, protect the ones you love, and shape your destiny in Enigma Heart, a modern new take on a classic action RPG formula. Blend exploration, magic, and combat with a variety of new abilities as you stand against the dark forces threatening your homeland.

4595810.title: Defenders of Ten Roads Crossing Tower Demo
4595810.short_description: No lanes. No safe paths. Build fast or fall. Fight and adapt in real time as enemies attack from every direction. Control your hero, place towers on the fly, and shape the battlefield in this intense 1–4 player tower defense.

4738440.title: DRAWCERY Demo
4738440.short_description: Draw your spells. Command the elements. DRAWCERY is an online PvP spell-summoning game with unique, draw-to-cast combat. Sketch elemental symbols in the heat of battle to unleash real-time magic and outplay your rivals like a true wizard.

4727710.title: Critternauts Demo
4727710.short_description: A modern JRPG adventure across the globe. Battle rogue critters with ancient tech, explore real-world cities with your party, uncover hidden secrets and solve the mystery of the Critternauts.

4733260.title: Chess Nuke Demo
4733260.short_description: RECRUIT, MERGE, and NUKE your board. Build game-breaking pieces and annihilate the enemy in this CHESS Roguelike.

4329790.title: Cave Crashers
4329790.short_description: Cave Crashers is a top-down arcade shooter game where two players take control of star-nosed moles, and cooperate to pilot a mining rig through bug infested caves. Progress as far as you can, collect valuable shards to increase your score while defending your RIG from bugs using your turrets.

4692210.title: The Pale Mimic Demo
4692210.short_description: 《The Pale Mimic》是一款以阿拉斯加荒野为背景的氛围恐怖游戏。作为一名在逃的高级通缉犯，你和你的爱犬在寒冷的森林中相依为命，直到不速之客的到来。

1167180.title: Slash The Tower
1167180.short_description: Slash the Tower is a turn-based climb: read foe intent & energy; gold-shop between fights; unlock floors/bosses on the map—rerun at tougher difficulties.

4615150.title: NRDominó
4615150.short_description: Classic domino gameplay with for local and online matches.

4595030.title: Typing Idler
4595030.short_description: An idle clicker that plays itself while you work. Your keyboard and mouse are the weapons. Type, click, level up, and watch your everyday inputs blast away stacking Tasks in glorious CRT-filtered style.

4594920.title: Triangles
4594920.short_description: Music freed from the timeline. Place triangles, launch balls, and build your own soundscape.

4696680.title: Skillful Pixel Dungeon
4696680.short_description: A roguelike RPG refined over 10 years with nearly 1M mobile downloads. Choose from 4 unique classes, explore procedural dungeons, and defeat epic bosses. Every run is different.

4445060.title: Shikhondo: Blue Pieta
4445060.short_description: 妖怪猎杀再次开始！这款横版弹幕射击游戏的故事发生在海外异国都市，将带你体验两位主角的冒险之旅！在枪林弹雨中，战胜燃烧着蓝火的怜子吧！

1551460.title: SKELOST
1551460.short_description: SKELOST is a yokai shooter built for the Game Boy Color, now on Steam. Immerse yourself in Japanese folklore and uncover the fate of your lost family.

3440280.title: Let's Freeze Some Penguins
3440280.short_description: Walnut the Walrus sets out to save his friends, and all of Northern Bear, from the dreaded Emperor Penguin. Luckily, his chilly Walrus Wind is ice cold. Now let’s freeze some penguins!

4601570.title: Fish Lab Demo
4601570.short_description: 一款简短的增量游戏，你将为实验室收集鱼。通过新发现进行升级。与音乐同步。

4693010.title: CRYPTSHOOTER
4693010.short_description: A horror roguelike FPS where you descend through 20 procedurally generated levels of a desecrated crypt, fighting biomechanical monsters, choosing weapons and perks between each wave, and dying over and over while an omniscient narrator watches.

4364430.title: Add Flyers To Dreams
4364430.short_description: 要不要在梦里投放广告？《ADD FLYERS TO DREAMS》是一款在梦中四处飞行、投放广告、累积合同、赚取饼干的 Flappy Roguelike 游戏。

4310110.title: 黎明村
4310110.short_description: 在饥荒面前，善意本身也成为资源的朝鲜时代生存策略游戏。 在朝鲜时代的大饥荒中，管理同伴与资源，所有关键抉择都由骰子决定。没有完美选择，只有承受结果，在今天生存，为明天做准备。

4607360.title: 论道聊斋 Demo
4607360.short_description: 以《聊斋》为灵感的中国志怪剧情游戏。以章节形式体验一个个独立的聊斋故事，在文字对话、事件触发与剧情推进中，走入充满人心、执念与因果的东方怪谈世界。

4267580.title: 死深 Die Deep Demo
4267580.short_description: 《死深 Die Deep》是一款聚焦纯粹敌我对峙的动作游戏。 没有地图探索、解谜或冗余要素，唯一的核心就是战斗！ 仔细观察敌人的动作，找出破绽、制定战略并精准出击！ 一次鲁莽的进攻或贪刀，就足以换来致命的失败及死亡。 身为忘却生存理由的游荡灵魂， 跟随着深渊无声的召唤， 去探寻那已被遗忘的，曾经最真实的渴望。

3965440.title: 尖叫怪物城 试玩版
3965440.short_description: 一个被人类收养的恶魔，一座年久失修的游乐园，一次有关惊吓艺术的文艺复兴。你将扮演胸怀理想的小恶魔，势必要将破旧的游乐园改造成最出色的恐怖主题乐园。

4724370.title: 命运之轮（序章）/Journey of Destiny(dependent origination) Demo
4724370.short_description: 这是一款兼具古风叙事与异世宿命的文字视觉小说。在与现实平行的异界，暗夜古族轩辕家与天圣魔宫两大势力百年对峙，至宝现世打破平衡。游戏采用人物专属视角叙事，剧情充满悬念反转：从家族灭门、庆典刺杀，到时空穿梭、灵魂融合，高能情节接连上演。你的选择将触发数十种分支剧情，最终导向匪患、兵变、赎罪等多重结局，家族兴衰全由你掌控。本作 1:1 还原原著核心剧情，并补充大量专属支线，用 Ren'Py 经典交互带来沉浸式体验。

3614170.title: 冰河
3614170.short_description: 为了寻找15年前失踪的母亲，南方青年阿顿在世纪末踏上了前往北国的旅程。他游走在江平这座昔日辉煌的工业重镇，一边追寻着家族的过往，一边发现自己的命运与这片辽阔、凛冽土地的历史紧密交织。当漫长的旅途即将抵达终点时，他想知道：故乡对一个人的生命，究竟意味着什么？

4281140.title: 仓鼠的贴纸册
4281140.short_description: 用可爱的贴纸装饰你的桌面!一款桌面覆盖贴纸册应用,让你在工作时自由地贴上和移除屏幕上的贴纸。

4372880.title: Yurei: Ink of the Damned
4372880.short_description: A third-person graphic adventure in which our protagonist enters a world of Japanese legends, where his objective will be to collect a series of cards to advance through the stories and escape from that world full of nightmares.

4434680.title: Welcome to Elite Cafe
4434680.short_description: 心跳加速的咖啡店经营游戏！ 接客、烹饪、研发新菜单 — Elite Cafe 今天也忙个不停！ 还能制作原创曲奇和饮品。 换上服装，你的本命就能当店长？

4650210.title: The Wicked Isles Demo
4650210.short_description: A Puzzle Roguelike of Risk and Deduction. Combine powers of artifacts, unlock new characters and find your way out of the cursed archipelago.

4669680.title: The Ultra Realistic Accurate Farmer Simulator
4669680.short_description: 一部短小而戏剧化的讽刺视觉小说，讲述农场生活的艰辛与挑战

4737010.title: Still Open: Taskbar Cafe Idle Demo
4737010.short_description: A cozy cafe living on your taskbar! "Still Open" is a peaceful idle game that runs in the background while you work. With an atmosphere that changes based on your system time, 60+ upgrades, mini-games, and built-in Pomodoro/Project Tracking tools, turn your productivity into a coffee break.

4698750.title: Squavity Demo
4698750.short_description: Squavity is a mind-bending, gravity-flipping precision platformer. Navigate through 9 brutal levels with a final boss fight, using your ability to flip gravity to overcome obstacles, evade traps, and unlock secrets hidden within a dynamic world.

4732130.title: Spright Demo
4732130.short_description: Spright is a hand-crafted 2D action-adventure about a lone warrior in a diving helm, drawn into the ruins of a fallen world. Forge, swim, and fight through luminous caverns, cursed foundries, and drowned ruins.

4303810.title: Sloop Demo
4303810.short_description: A fast-paced, sea-faring, adventure where you’ll have to learn to turn. Brave the waters in the demo now!

4593280.title: Silly Suspects Demo
4593280.short_description: Take on the role of a detective in this comical Guess-Who detective mystery. Investigate absurd crimes in a weird and wacky world. Question suspects, learn their habits, and rule them out one by one until you uncover the truth hiding beneath all the nonsense.

4698640.title: Resurface Demo
4698640.short_description: 在这款休闲的增量挖矿游戏中逃离深海。挖矿、升级、探索不同的生物群落，让你的力量成倍疯狂增长！

3878820.title: Quizy Peasy
3878820.short_description: A fun multiplayer quiz for up to 8 players. Use your phone or tablet as a controller while the game runs on your PC. Choose between fast Blitz rounds, classic Standard play, or relaxed Party mode. Perfect for friends, parties, and good laughs.

4476380.title: Prerolled Demo
4476380.short_description: Sell prerolled dice to make crazy money in this silly roguelite incremental puzzle mix-up. Pack dice in boxes, make absurd combos and happily overcharge your quirky clients!

2955720.title: Panthalassa
2955720.short_description: Panthalassa 是一款以水下外星世界为背景的点击式视觉小说。 您扮演一个人工智能，试图揭开其身体前主人的记忆。 通过不同的用户界面体验世界，物理世界和数字世界在这里碰撞。

4725280.title: One Degree Off Demo
4725280.short_description: One Degree Off 是一款 2D 解谜游戏，它将激光物理转化为引人入胜的烧脑挑战。掌握反射与折射机制，引导多束激光穿过复杂关卡。混合并拆分彩色光束，控制激光强度，找到通往目标的最佳路径。

3369490.title: Noxcode
3369490.short_description: Reach the TOP by any means possible. Run, jump, climb, fly, or even fall your way up in this chaotic jump quest platformer. Master crazy movement, discover wild shortcuts, and push your skills to the limit!

4565750.title: Mr. President We Have A Situation!
4565750.short_description: Mr. President We Have a Situation! is a desktop overlay game that is always on screen. It is intended to be played alongside work or study sessions. Your advisors will ask you for your leadership that will have long lasting consequences on your resources.

3712250.title: Lucifer's Grand Adventure
3712250.short_description: A cute 2D platformer about a cat trying to escape a lab, save all the stray kittens and find a home for all of them to live.

4119360.title: It Reaches
4119360.short_description: 《It Reaches》是一款第一人称恐怖游戏，通过警察随身摄像头的视角展开。你被困在废弃医院的设施内，必须设法逃离潜伏在地下的恐怖。揭开遗留的黑暗谜团，切勿被抓住！它们正向你伸出魔爪……

4455950.title: Humans Vs Orcs
4455950.short_description: Hold the line against the orc horde in this side-scrolling incremental strategy game. Recruit humans and mercenaries, master active abilities, and survive escalating waves of orcs, dragons, and bosses. Every run gets harder — and you get stronger.

4213880.title: High Pleasure Mall
4213880.short_description: In this horror game, you'll explore an abandoned shopping mall, solving puzzles along the way using various objects. You'll also be attacked by robots that have lost control after the building exploded. Your goal is to survive.

4602470.title: Graviton Core
4602470.short_description: Absorb mass. Bend gravity. Detonate everything. A fast-paced hardcore bullet hell where every explosion is your choice.

4598880.title: Forgotten Depths
4598880.short_description: （Forgotten Depths）是一款受 PS1 启发的一款潜行恐怖游戏。你发现自己被困在古老的地下墓穴中，但想要逃离并非易事……你唤醒了潜伏在深处的“受诅咒的囚徒”。

4578760.title: Forestress Shade
4578760.short_description: Forestress Shade is a strategy puzzle game that combines roguelike elements with chess. Command, battle, win, and acquire new animals. Control your animal army, defeat the approaching enemies, and venture to the edge of the deadshade forest.

4618450.title: FloraHive Demo
4618450.short_description: Build, Upgrade, and then Move your Towers in this unique twist on the Tower Defence genre. With Rogue-Lite mechanics every run offers new strategies, and every death unlocks new upgrades. Grow. Evolve. Destroy the Robots!

4576290.title: Firearms and Fantasy Demo
4576290.short_description: 一款融合基地经营、军棋式推进与异世界探索的策略游戏。你将在内忧外患的危局中临危受命，率领现代军队越过传送门，抵御不断升级的威胁并争夺关键资源。

4527110.title: Dirty Business: Free of Charge
4527110.short_description: 在隐藏的地下机库中建立你的犯罪帝国。生产毒品、制造武器、印刷假钞等。雇佣员工，扩张帮派，升级基地，单人或合作掌控城市分销。

4736410.title: Deep Sea Fish: Hidden World Demo
4736410.short_description: A short incremental fishing game where you catch fish, earn gold, and unlock powerful upgrades to explore the deep sea.

4443800.title: Cyber Units
4443800.short_description: Generate. Upgrade. Optimize. Build an infinite production protocol in a futuristic incremental experience where every click fuels exponential growth.

4665420.title: Crownseeker Demo
4665420.short_description: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

4725750.title: Corporate 0 Demo
4725750.short_description: You're trapped in your office after a typical working day. Carefully explore every corner to reach the freedom and break the loop.

4716480.title: Consorts of the Emperor Demo
4716480.short_description: Win the heart of the Emperor by presenting the best gifts and outplaying your rivals in this digital version of the boardgame Consorts of the Emperor!

4528050.title: Cold Decree Demo
4528050.short_description: Cold Decree is an atmospheric detective game that puts you in charge of a forensic laboratory. Scrutinize unsolved case files, analyze objects, and manually query the technical data within massive databases. Stop guessing; identify the perpetrator using only concrete evidence.

4712970.title: Choppy Waves Demo
4712970.short_description: Choppy Waves is an online co-op party game for up to 4 players where you run a floating bar on the open ocean, mixing drinks and serving customers while waves send everyone sliding across the deck.

4711330.title: BattleTabs Demo
4711330.short_description: A strategic twist on Battleship where every ship has unique abilities. Build your fleet of 4, outsmart your opponent with cooldown-based powers, and climb the ranked leaderboards. Free to play with cross-platform multiplayer.

4666710.title: Battle Boss Demo
4666710.short_description: Manage your very own battlemon gym! In this demo, experience a few days in the life of a Battle Boss, where it's your job to battle challengers and manage your gym!

4651320.title: Ashes of Holloway Bay
4651320.short_description: Immerse yourself in a chilling, interactive cold-case investigation. Review crime scene photos, decrypt restricted hard drives, compare evidence, and deliver your final report in Ashes of Holloway Bay, a dark, atmospheric detective experience where every detail matters.

4681020.title: Artificial Dawn
4681020.short_description: Defeat is not the end. After a game over, return to your base to strengthen with battle points and try again. Artificial Dawn is a shooting game designed to grow stronger the more you try, and anyone can clear it as long as they don't give up.

4739700.title: Alchemist Chronicles Demo
4739700.short_description: Brew remedies, heal the sick, and face impossible choices. You are the only healer in a small village — but sometimes you must choose who lives and who doesn't.

4711010.title: AirDrive Demo
4711010.short_description: Defend the last stronghold on a ravaged Earth against relentless enemies. Take control of your fighter jet with your whole body and face the overwhelming waves of foes. AirDrive is a defense motion-action roguelite featuring endless dogfights, diverse parts, and webcam-based motion controls.

4617760.title: Agraria Demo
4617760.short_description: Some days you just want to dig in the dirt and watch something grow. Agraria gets it. Build your dream farm at your own pace - tilling, planting, harvesting, and slowly building an agricultural empire - all under the caring, non-intrusive guidance of Agraria Inc. (Terms and conditions may apply.)

4651880.title: 6600：The Park
4651880.short_description: 你是一名调查员，奉命前往一座因“失控事件”而封闭的偏远古生物公园。园内设施瘫痪，曾经的观光区如今被凶猛的恐龙占据。你需要深入园区，搜集线索，查明失控真相，并赶在救援到来前找到撤离点，活着离开。

4324620.title: 100 Factory Cats
4324620.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4729210.title: 巴掌大的农场 Demo
4729210.short_description: 这是一款轻松休闲的桌面放置类农场经营游戏。你将在一块小小的土地上种植作物、收集资源、购买并升级设施，偶尔逗逗小鸟，敲击键盘或点击鼠标收获额外金币，逐步扩建自己的农场，在悠闲的节奏中体验从播种到丰收的满足感！

4725490.title: Soulwoven Princess Demo
4725490.short_description: Survive a toxic royal family in this story-rich life sim and tactical deckbuilder. As the Princess, manage your schedule, shape your personality, and build powerful shard decks. Your choices permanently alter the story. Play the 6-turn demo and uncover 5 unique endings.

4611750.title: Pinball Tide
4611750.short_description: Pinball Tide 是一款 roguelike 弹球游戏。操控挡板来获得分数，并有策略地赚取金币。使用分数强化玩法，花费金币抽取更高稀有度的球并进行合并。通过合并，你可以发现新的挡板和球。

4706840.title: Cleaning The Ocean Demo
4706840.short_description: The ocean didn't get dirty on its own. Pilot your submarine through vast underwater worlds, collect the trash humanity left behind, and uncover what's been growing in the dark. Clean, explore, upgrade and try not to look too closely at what's following you.

3296830.title: 真探3
3296830.short_description: 面对碎片化叙事与各怀鬼胎的询问对象，你需要在大浪淘沙中筛选证据，从只言片语里击碎逻辑漏洞，用蛛丝马迹重构真实全貌。抛弃偏见，用推理解开这场硬核挑战。这场沉浸式脑力博弈，你能通关吗？

2537470.title: 疫区档案
2537470.short_description: 致敬90年代生存恐怖经典《生化危机》。深入被封锁的死城，直面令人窒息的孤立与嗜血的畸变怪物。拼凑散落破碎的真相，在资源极度匮乏的博弈中步步为营。在这里，每一颗子弹都是奢侈的希望。当退路封死、弹尽粮绝，唯有最冷静的大脑，才能在绝境中计算出一线生机。

3900120.title: Život Není Krásný: Poslední Exekuce
3900120.short_description: A hand‑drawn, old‑school point‑and‑click adventure filled with dark humor and unapologetically over‑the‑top violence. Step into the shoes of the degenerate bailiff Vladimír Brehowski and follow him through his final day on the job.

979110.title: Space Haven
979110.short_description: 率领一群身份复杂的下层社会平民，乘坐飞船踏上太空之旅，寻找新的家园。在这款太空船殖民地模拟经营类游戏中，你可以一砖一瓦地建造太空船，创造最佳的气体条件，管理船员的各种需求和情绪，并尽情探索广袤的宇宙。

3237640.title: Dark Dominion
3237640.short_description: 《Dark Dominion》是一段阴暗的类魂故事。男子失去一切：妻子在生产时去世，女儿几年后因肺炎离世。心碎的他参军并战死。死亡将他拖入扭曲的冥界，他必须找到妻女的灵魂，否则就会随阴影一同消散。

2525510.title: 终末机兵
2525510.short_description: 这是一款融合了钢铁、烈火、羁绊与热血王道动漫风格的沙盒战术RPG。在这个被暴走AI统治的世界里，组建你的战队，改装你的机甲，投身于电影级演出的回合制战斗。你们之间的羁绊，将决定谁能活到最后！

3100370.title: 地狱黑杰克 Black Jacket
3100370.short_description: 一款以21点规则为基础的卡牌构筑游戏，在冥界与徘徊的亡魂对局21点。构建卡组、觉醒卡牌、收集神器，与过往的亡魂对决，揭开纠缠的过去，赢取灵魂硬币，贿赂摆渡人——逃离这个永不结束的噩梦。

4641700.title: Sill Cats
4641700.short_description: 小猫们搬进了你的桌面。它们会在窗口上走来走去，和光标玩耍，在角落睡觉，还可能在凌晨两点突然狂奔。免费包含 2 种猫。

2599690.title: Better Than Dead
2599690.short_description: 一款以香港为舞台的残酷随身摄像机视角复仇 FPS。滑铲进入子弹时间，近距离战斗，击倒绑架你的人，并记录复仇的每一秒。

2255370.title: 8020号指令
2255370.short_description: 地球正在走向终结，人类的时间已所剩无几。距离地球12光年的天仓五f星是最后一线希望。当殖民飞船仙后号在这颗星球紧急着陆后，他们很快就发现自己不是唯一的访客。

4187140.title: 别慌！还剩一个引擎哈
4187140.short_description: 一款节奏紧凑的合作解谜游戏,飞行员与空中交通管制员必须沟通、破译并即兴应变,以拯救一架即将坠毁的飞机。说得快,解得更快,并尽量别坠机。

2681030.title: Outbound / 拾光旅人
2681030.short_description: 探索这个绚丽多彩的世界，建造属于你的温馨移动之家。制作工作台，利用太阳能、风能或水能，升级并定制车辆，种植庄稼，实现自给自足的可持续生活，支持4名玩家组队冒险。

3048930.title: Duriano
3048930.short_description: 杜里亚诺 是一款 罗格莱特 类型的俯视角竞技场动作游戏，玩家将扮演来自北欧的勇敢榴莲英雄，手持武器与北欧神话中的众神展开激烈战斗。通过武器、榴莲英雄、神之路径以及道具的多重组合，玩家可以打造强大的构筑，最终征服烈焰巨人。

4584240.title: Cheap Car Repair: Welcome to Nowhere
4584240.short_description: 了解扬努什故事的开端——他是来自“鸟不拉屎的鬼地方”的本地机械师。经营你自己的修车厂，想尽办法钻空子周旋应付，但可得小心！你应该不会想惹上当地商人克日什托夫·雅日纳吧……

2535950.title: Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes
2535950.short_description: In Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes, take command of a fleet escaping the annihilation of the Twelve Colonies. Manage crises on board as you prepare for the next encounter with the Cylon Fleet. Times are dire, and hard choices must be made. Your only hope: rejoin the Battlestar Galactica.

3582250.title: 从农场到餐桌 / Farm to Table
3582250.short_description: 含基地建造的农场&餐厅经营模拟。后院种植、烹饪并上桌！探索小岛食材解锁新食谱：采集、钓鱼、养动物、用机器生产。管理资源、雇员工，把有机事业做成五星餐厅！

3894440.title: NO BACKUP
3894440.short_description: 一起逃生——否则孤独死去。 在这款紧张刺激的合作体视角恐怖游戏中，你和你的队伍将被一个无情的怪物追猎。 沟通、保持安静、奋力求生。 每一个动作都至关重要，每一个声音都可能是你最后的声音。

3526710.title: 万物皆可蟹：动物进化 Roguelite | Everything is Crab
3526710.short_description: 一款以动物进化为核心的 Roguelite 游戏。 在充满生机的生态系统中捕猎、逃生、觅食并茁壮成长。每局游戏都可从 125 +种进化与特化方向中做出选择，打造独一无二的生物构筑。顺应自然法则以求生存，最终打破“蟹化”的宿命……否则，就只能在进化的长河中沦为炮灰！

4479970.title: Scary Game 2: The Mad Shepherd
4479970.short_description: 你作为村里新任牧羊人的第一天……一切都出错了。动物失踪了。村民很诡异。而真相比这更加可怕。

3639010.title: Jackpot Crash Course
3639010.short_description: In a game show starring only criminals, you must gamble against rival players to prove yourself worthy of being pardoned for your wrong deeds— But is the show really about proving your innocence? Jackpot Crash Course is a death game visual novel about crime, luck and spectacle.

4435720.title: HOLY GRAIL for DUMMIES
4435720.short_description: HOLY GRAIL for DUMMIES is a colorful and absurd action-platformer about Buckethead, a hero past his prime, in a world that, let's be honest, has seen better days...

3043760.title: HELLBREAK
3043760.short_description: HELLBREAK是一款快节奏的Roguelite第一人称射击游戏，融合类幸存者玩法。在地狱竞技场中对抗不断增强的敌人浪潮。构建强力流派，赢得恶魔领主的青睐并解锁新装备，冲击排行榜争取救赎。

3232380.title: 蛙穿雪境
3232380.short_description: 在这款生存类 Roguelike 游戏中，扮演一只蛙蛙，挖掘积雪、寻找宝藏、解锁升级，对抗神秘生物。想活下去？要么找到逃生之门，远走高飞；要么强化实力，干掉最终 Boss。

3110760.title: 皓白初晓
3110760.short_description: 在这款由《远星物语（CrossCode）》的创作者带来的全新俯视角2.5D动作冒险游戏中打破倪克斯的诅咒，指引人类的复兴。用华丽的连招与敌人战斗，使用多种神圣武器，解开引人入胜的谜题，探索一个不断变化的世界。

4537540.title: 海神捕鱼
4537540.short_description: 《海神捕鱼》采用全新次世代引擎倾力打造，拥有突破极限的美术表现力，完美复刻经典街机捕鱼玩法。游戏内设多个亚特兰蒂斯奇幻3D渔场，等您来捕获各种潜藏在深海的神秘BOSS。炫酷的深海场景、超高清的电影级画质，为您奉上一场绝对震撼的视听盛宴。

3161400.title: 战术扫雷：肉鸽Plus
3161400.short_description: 当扫雷遇上肉鸽，用战术思维扫清迷雾。基于经典扫雷，以Rogue-lite玩法赋予无限可能。卡牌、改造方块、永久强化三重成长，扫雷爽局一键解压。规划你的经济，组合强化套路，思考战术打法，对抗复杂且致命的雷区陷阱。随机生成关卡，无限挑战，体验新世代的扫雷Plus。

4111260.title: 恶意
4111260.short_description: 《恶意》是一款3D第一人称多视角心理恐怖游戏。你是一名独自生活的年轻女性，为了省钱租下了一间崭新却出奇便宜的公寓。 在这里，你感受到前所未有的“恶意”……无处不在的眼睛，从衣柜、床底、墙洞，以及每一个存在缝隙的角落注视着你。

4304230.title: 历史模拟器：崇祯
4304230.short_description: 本作的初衷不在于让崇祯单纯地赢，而是编写一部属于你的王朝兴衰故事。虽然历史绝对不可改写，但在世界模型的推演下，你的每一次抉择都将引发蝴蝶效应，书写出全新的篇章。我们希望玩家在体验演义故事的疯狂与逻辑博弈的残酷时，能在直面王朝或崩塌或强盛的激荡中，悄悄生出对真实历史的敬畏。

3144860.title: WILL: Follow The Light
3144860.short_description: 深入体验一场现实主义的单人第一人称冒险之旅，穿越严酷的北纬地区，在这片无尽水域上航行，寻找回到您所爱之人身边的路。您会跟随光的指引吗？

3441280.title: The Greenening
3441280.short_description: 踏上一场短暂的治愈放置旅程，探索一个苏醒之中的失落世界。洗去灰烬，揭开隐藏其下的秘密，升级各类浇灌能力，让独属于你的温馨宇宙花园肆意生长。

2474430.title: TetherGeist
2474430.short_description: 一款充满挑战与温情的硬核跳台游戏。运用灵魂出窍的神奇力量，完成一场危机四伏的成长试炼之旅。精通灵敏操控，克服重重考验，让灵体指引你抵达旅程终点。

2654490.title: Relic Arena
2654490.short_description: Relic Arena is an 8-player free-to-play autobattler by Dota 2 personalities SUNSfan and Jenkins. Equip heroes with historical relics, that provide unique abilities and upgrades, under the command of legendary historical figures such as Cleopatra and Harambe.

2582320.title: Mixtape
2582320.short_description: 在齐聚的最后一晚，三位好友踏上了最后一次冒险之旅。伴着混音带走过青春记忆，陶醉在属于一代人的经典旋律中。

2473350.title: HUNTDOWN: OVERTIME
2473350.short_description: 大财团将犯罪横行的街道化作赏金猎手的牟利场，约翰·索耶即将大赚一笔。在这部刺激的Roguelite前传中不断猎杀、阵亡、升级，每项战略升级都将剥离更多血肉，以机械义肢逐步锻造生化人战士。

3844750.title: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR
3844750.short_description: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR is destructive arcade racing at windshield distance. Trade paint, lose control, recover hard, and survive as rivals, debris, and pileups close in from every side.

2570210.title: Eden Crafters
2570210.short_description: 在 Eden Crafters 中踏上生存、手工和自动化的冒险之旅，这是一款开放世界的合作游戏，挑战你将一个充满敌意的星球变成人类的避难所。 调节气候，创造可呼吸的大气和海洋：塑造一个新世界！

1826420.title: CarX Drift Racing Online 2
1826420.short_description: A drifting simulator featuring an authentic competition format and a judging system inspired by modern drift championships. Enhanced and updated physics, developed in collaboration with the CarX Motorsport team.

2854480.title: Blindfire
2854480.short_description: Blindfire 在漆黑的竞技场中提供独特的 FPS 动作游戏。依靠声音和高科技小工具，以全新方式发展你的技能。适合与朋友进行快速、紧张的比赛。

2056200.title: 总征程
2056200.short_description: 《Summa Expeditionis》是一款以古罗马帝国为背景的基地建设与策略游戏。跟随一名罗马士兵的职业生涯，从军团士兵晋升为百夫长。建设并管理你的营地，招募更多士兵，为罗马的荣耀对抗蛮族。

4235230.title: Werewolf: The Inner Beast
4235230.short_description: 狼人：内在之兽 是一款第三人称3D生存恐怖游戏，女主角视角。故事驱动的线性玩法，带有黑暗、 claustrophobic 的压抑氛围。

3802470.title: Turnbound - 武装博弈
3802470.short_description: 刀枪棍棒在手，披挂兜鍪加身，十八般武艺尽出；符文层层叠叠，圣物各司其职，传奇英雄列阵在旁，胜负尽在你的一次次摆放之间。在这里武器、护甲、站位交织成一套严密的战斗体系，你的策略与巧思才是致胜关键。挑选一位英雄，统御你的武装，踏入这场自走棋博弈吧！

3672400.title: Farever
3672400.short_description: 在遗忘国度中铸就你的传奇！《Farever》是一款设定于广阔奇幻开放世界的多人在线动作RPG。无论独行还是与好友同行，都能踏上一场史诗冒险！探索荒野与危险地牢，打造多件强力装备，在爽快战斗与平台跳跃中开辟属于自己的道路。

3742830.title: 觉醒者：战斗之潮
3742830.short_description: 《觉醒者：战斗之潮》融合了“暗黑”式的装备构筑深度与“无双”般的割草快感。在20-50小时的密集体验中，面对成吨的怪物潮，用数百种词缀与天赋打造你的专属流派。没有复杂的前戏，只有纯粹的杀怪、爆装、变强。

3868320.title: 点击炼金术
3868320.short_description: 在这款点击放置增量游戏中，踏上成为炼金大师之路。探索神秘的禁忌森林，收集丰富的自然资源，点亮繁茂的技能树，制作各种奇妙的魔法机械。击败怪物，种植作物，打造你的魔法基地，成为无所不能的点击炼金术师吧！

2769240.title: 我看人下碟 / Wax Heads
2769240.short_description: 《我看人下碟》是一款温馨的朋克风格叙事模拟游戏，在这里你需要在一家勉强维持生计的唱片店中工作。与品味独特的古怪顾客交谈，探索手工制作唱片收藏，爱上几只乐队（还有关于他们的趣闻！），或者与你的同事摸鱼度日，只要大家能够重新律动起来就好！

2830030.title: 废都电锯姬
2830030.short_description: 在这款氛围绝佳的生活风动作冒险游戏中，在充满各种巨型建筑的废墟间进行跑酷，攀爬巨型机械头目，并猎杀所有建筑设备。

3404260.title: 亡命迪斯科
3404260.short_description: 在《死亡迪斯科》中，武术与MV节奏激情碰撞。在这款霓虹闪烁的节奏格斗游戏里，每一拳、每一脚、每一个连招都将与音乐完美同步。 跟随查理·迪斯科的脚步，踏上对抗邪恶巨星、重组乐队的征程。

3242950.title: Outworld Station
3242950.short_description: 在这款震撼的太空站工厂自动化游戏中，您将作为新任空间站指挥官执掌大权，开拓一个外星恒星系。在充满敌意的宇宙中积累资源、建造星舰，运用日益先进的制造技术并不断扩张您的空间站。

3169580.title: Never Second in Rome
3169580.short_description: Never Second in Rome is a turn-based historical game with RPG and management elements. You are a Roman centurion in the army of Julius Caesar. You will control both your character and the unit under his command.

4514790.title: Candellum
4514790.short_description: Play as a candle warrior fighting to keep your flame alive in a world where fire means life and death. Steal wax from enemies to survive, wield your flame tactically in intense hack-and-slash combat, and uncover the dark secrets of a dormant wax factory filled with danger !

3214480.title: 王牌妖相
3214480.short_description: 一款以卡牌机制驱动的政治 Roguelike 游戏。在这所由货真价实的怪兽构成的议会中博弈求生。争夺选票、践踏规则、周旋于丑闻并强行通过荒谬法案。只为在这个极度扭曲、荒诞至极的民主反乌托邦里，捍卫你的最高权位。

3449590.title: 武林生存
3449590.short_description: 《武林生存》是一款在限定时间内对抗不断涌来的敌人并求生的生存Roguelite游戏。探索正在灭亡的世界，获得武功、装备和特性，蜕变为武林的英雄。

4201710.title: 喵了个菜！
4201710.short_description: 喵了个菜!是一款越敲长势越好、越点越热闹的轻松耕作小游，每个字、每次点击都能让你的作物拔节生长。和朋友联机时还能悄悄去偷果实，用偷来的战利品换上各种可爱的装饰，把自己的农场打造成独一无二的小天地。

2964090.title: World of Warships: Legends
2964090.short_description: 加入这款战斗节奏明快、玩法简单易上手、操作直观，并支持Steam、主机和移动设备跨平台畅玩的免费在线海战PvP射击游戏。600+艘战舰和150+名指挥官、丰富多元化的地图和战术任君选择。立即畅玩，成为传奇！

2536720.title: U.V.S.化现号
2536720.short_description: 《U.V.S.化现号》是一款由《改善：工厂物语》与Zach-like类型的制作团队Coincidence开发的工程解谜游戏。登上不归虚空之船化现号，踏上通往宇宙边缘的漫长旅程 ?

3648730.title: Blood Vial
3648730.short_description: BLOOD VIAL is a retro-inspired micro-FPS with a leaking health bar. Swim through the spilled blood of your fallen enemies to keep your vial full. Grow increasingly powerful with new upgrades and weapons. Navigate an ever-shifting labyrinth of crypts, catacombs and cathedrals.

3580340.title: 废土履迹（Existential Treads）
3580340.short_description: 一款以后末日废土世界为背景的生存射击+城市建造+塔防游戏。发展你的定居点，抵御一波又一波的敌人，恢复自然环境。

4157130.title: 黑暗密友：望升院
4157130.short_description: 在这废弃的儿童收容所里，孤身直面邪祟游荡的惊魂噩梦。穿梭于色彩迷离的走廊，用墨水冲击枪解开谜题，躲避凶恶的杀手玩偶，揭开那段你曾试图尘封的过往记忆。你还记得吗？

4575390.title: 汪汪大作战
4575390.short_description: 变成狗。叫。然后赢。「汪汪大作战」是一款对着麦克风真正"汪汪"叫的实时1v1对战游戏。支持Steam在线对战！用声音大小和连续叫声推动拔河能量条！可爱的狗狗们、犬道故事模式、螃蟹生存模式一应俱全。和朋友、家人、甚至心仪的那个TA一起全力吠叫吧！

1494560.title: 末日电涌 Rogue Voltage
1494560.short_description: 工程类肉鸽游戏。通过连接电路构建你的连击。建造疯狂的机器来电翻怪物，触发令人满足的连锁反应。发现毁灭性的协同效果，创造超强的构建。

3509230.title: 千棋百计
3509230.short_description: 《千棋百计》是一款融合国际象棋和肉鸽元素的回合制游戏，玩家将在危机四伏的微型棋盘上展开对弈。你需要精通诡变策略，懂得运用奖金资源，不断发掘打破常规的全新弃兵、棋格和棋子组合。你可以对抗极富挑战性的BOSS，尽情探索颠覆传统国际象棋陈规的无限可能！

3744080.title: Mining Merchant
3744080.short_description: Mining Merchant是一款轻松的采矿与店铺经营冒险游戏。白天挖掘，寻找稀有矿石和宝石；夜晚打造首饰并在店中出售。单人或合作重建叔叔的生意，揭开地震之谜。

3601800.title: Meltopia
3601800.short_description: A minimalist game where you melt snow with a heat cannon to explore a mysterious frozen world. Uncover glacial secrets, collect valuable resources and ancient artifacts — and ultimately find and assemble the remains of an ancient Mammoth.

3892270.title: Gamble With Your Friends
3892270.short_description: An online 1-6 player co-op "casino crawler" where you and your friends share one bank account and one massive debt. Gamble, buy sketchy items, make terrible decisions, and climb an ominous casino tower to hit your loan shark’s daily quota in 5 minutes - or face the consequences.

2026820.title: Die in the Dungeon
2026820.short_description: 在这款类Rogue回合制牌组构建游戏中从神秘的地牢里杀出一条血路，不过你用的不是卡牌，而是骰子！在骰子盘上组合强力骰子来对付敌人，还能用魔法遗物强化骰子的效果。游戏中还有意料之外的遭遇，你需要冒险赌上一切，而结果如何全看天意。

3056840.title: A Bumpy Ride
3056840.short_description: Take a jaunt into the world of A Bumpy Ride, a cozy train-driving and exploration game! Inspired by railroading of the 19th century with a whimsical spin, you'll adventure around the open frontier in your trusty little train, picking up passengers and freight.

3105440.title: 魔法门之英雄无敌：上古纪元 Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
3105440.short_description: 《魔法门之英雄无敌：上古纪元》是誉满全球的回合制策略经典《英雄无敌》系列的正统前传。集结浩荡大军，施展撼天动地的法术，在单人战役与多人对战中荡平群敌。

3596700.title: 泰拉科技魇团
3596700.short_description: 《泰拉科技魇团》，一款混乱爽快的“弹幕射击”建造游戏。自由拼装模块化终极战车，在一波波机械敌潮中破局求生，以高速冲撞与无限弹幕火力，彻底摧毁自由无人机团。

3885590.title: 昏迷3：血脉
3885590.short_description: 欢迎来到《昏迷3: 血脉》的世界。在这个阴影笼罩的境地，谣言和都市传说变成了现实，处处都潜藏着危机。凡是有血肉之躯闯入并死在这里，其肉体与灵魂将遭到分离，永世不再苏醒…

2356780.title: 抓抓地牢
2356780.short_description: 《抓抓地牢》是一款结合了娃娃机玩法的Roguelike卡牌构筑游戏。构建你的卡组，从抓娃娃机中抓取武器和道具！与敌人激战，搭配强大的增益效果，创造出改变战局的组合，并在地牢探险中释放疯狂的连招吧！

4005300.title: 失恋玩家
4005300.short_description: 彗星来的那一夜，你意外穿越进一款恋爱游戏。更让你震惊的是，你在游戏里创建的三个角色：大明星梦娜、小护士菲菲和女教师佳宜竟然真的生活在这里。你的突然出现，让负责维护“有爱城”治安的警花安迪，误以为你是蓄意搞破坏的犯罪分子。为了证明自己的身份，你必须在游戏关服之前，完成安迪布置的任务：获得真爱！与此同时，一场惊天阴谋正在向你逼近……

4197610.title: 图书管理员：整理魔法图书馆吧！
4197610.short_description: 《图书管理员：整理魔法图书馆吧！》是一款单人游玩的模拟游戏。 你的任务是将散落在魔法图书馆中的全部 3,072 本书，归回原本的位置。 学习各种能力，运用策略提升整理效率，比任何人更快完成整理吧！

3794610.title: 哥布林维克：窃贼大亨
3794610.short_description: 夜晚潜行盗宝，白天吹牛卖货。 体验狡诈哥布林的双面人生：在危机四伏的地宫中偷取魔王秘宝，再用天花乱坠的话术把宝物高价卖给冤大头。招募雇员，扩张店铺，在多方势力间左右逢源。从负债累累的贫穷哥布林，一路逆袭成呼风唤雨的黑金大亨！

3840230.title: 可爱冒险记
3840230.short_description: 化身宝瑞，一只好奇的野猪宝宝。在一场森林大火之后，宝瑞必须学会如何用鼻子去寻找家人。这是一场温暖人心的动物大冒险，你将在这里探索美丽风景，追踪气味，揭开秘密，慢慢地与大自然重新连接。

4308110.title: 你的后妈
4308110.short_description: 是一款完全失控的桌宠，带你沉浸式体验当一个“极品”后妈的儿子的滋味。准备好享受这段一言难尽的亲子关系吧。

2723430.title: inKONBINI: One Store. Many Stories
2723430.short_description: 《inKONBINI: 一家小店，故事多多》是一款第三人称单人模拟游戏，背景设置在20世纪90年代初期的一家小镇便利店。你需要整理货架、与顾客展开有意义的对话，并见证你做出的每个选择会如何影响他们的生活！

1910150.title: Walk of Life
1910150.short_description: 《牛马三百六十行》是一款搞笑的生活模拟游戏，玩家将在枯燥的生活中激烈地卷啊卷啊卷。游戏包括各种令人愕然的特色机制，例如找工作、学习、买东西。可以本地联机，也可以在线联机，对抗朋友或者冤家，成为真正的人生赢家！

4709670.title: Your Own Cozy Motel Demo
4709670.short_description: Build and run your own roadside motel in a hands-on simulator. Check in guests, clean and repair rooms, manage payments, upgrade facilities, and grow from a small stopover into a thriving, high-reputation business.

4719640.title: Deeper Demo
4719640.short_description: Go on expeditions with your friends to explore the depths in search of treasures, upgrade your gear, and dive back in deeper.

3616260.title: MAZEBOUND: Hunt, Gather, Run!
3616260.short_description: 在这款生存恐怖游戏中，你被大海包围，前方是一扇高耸的大门。走进迷宫，狩猎、收集，并奔跑求生，无论是独自一人还是与朋友一起。记住：挨饿的不只有你……

2174380.title: 古神之呼唤
2174380.short_description: 在这款克苏鲁风格的剧情向解谜冒险游戏中，踏上前往地球偏远角落的旅程，探索远古的恐怖存在。本作为 2020 年广受好评的《海之呼唤》的续篇。

3784760.title: Elfie: A Sand Plan
3784760.short_description: Elfie: A Sand Plan is a relaxing and intuitive puzzle game where you help a small ambitious elephant build some sand castles. Enjoy spending time at the beach with your new rotund friend!

3670740.title: Burgle Supply Company
3670740.short_description: 一款合作类恐怖喜剧游戏，适合与朋友一起游玩，主题是在一个满是变异宠物的噩梦社区中进行盗窃。这活儿肯定不轻松，但你也许能顺手牵羊一台精美的木纹卡带录像机逃出生天。

3432650.title: 追曙
3432650.short_description: 《追曙》是一款以东南亚为背景，融合了中式民俗元素的恐怖剧情游戏。2015年，警察杨帆在值班时收到一段模糊的无线电求救：“…山上…救孩子们”，信号源指向一栋废弃公寓，而档案显示——这栋公寓曾发生少女自杀案。随着调查深入，线索逐渐拼凑，杨帆发现这起案件背后，隐藏着一个无人敢触碰的黑暗秘密。

3670630.title: Besmirch
3670630.short_description: The town of Besmirch starves. Stave off the hunger as the latest farmhand in this survival horror farming sim, earning the trust of paranoid townsfolk under the thumb of the corrupt Baron. Tend to both your farm and the town while avoiding unholy terrors that come in the night.

3968100.title: CD-ROM
3968100.short_description: 10张CD，10个密码。寻找隐藏信息、文字与数字，解锁下一张CD，继续你的隐写术谜题之旅。

2190920.title: 核元突破！
2190920.short_description: 你，叫诺瓦，是机器人。设计者让你在人类被机械灭种时刻醒来，去拯救？寻找？打败？总之，你肩负着重要使命。解锁并强化你的能力和武器，打败机械强敌，寻找到你存在的目的。

3804180.title: 在姉正泰镇渡过的暑假
3804180.short_description: 邻家姐姐、辣妹、学生会长、朋友的妈妈……被各种大姐姐包围的我，究竟这个暑假会变得有多好玩呢？

2680670.title: 闻鼓而战
2680670.short_description: 在这款 Roguelite 战略回合制游戏中，带领一支部落战乐团，与 Wardrum 的节拍协同来发动攻势吧！在这个弥漫着节奏魔法的严酷幻想世界中开辟道路、直面死亡并强化你的战士，最终清除败侵蚀这片大陆的黑暗巫术。

3228580.title: 失落国度：死境求生
3228580.short_description: 《失落王国幸存者》是一款在线合作类生存自动射击游戏。与成群结队的凶猛敌人战斗，探寻古老的神器，融合独特的技能树，并解锁强大的升级博得一线生机。倾泻失落王国的全部力量和魔法。单人游玩或与好友一起对抗无情的爪牙！

4517350.title: 传奇盛世
4517350.short_description: 在《传奇盛世》里,无首充！无套路! 无强制消费! 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

4183230.title: In Trusted Hands
4183230.short_description: Dive into the daily work of a cozy workshop in a big city, accompanied by relaxing atmospheric music. Manage client data, balance energy and stress, and make choices that shape the story and its outcome.

2959770.title: Duck Side of the Moon
2959770.short_description: Waddle and fly as a duck in space! Explore every corner of the galaxy and find curious creatures and materials along the way. Craft gadgets, upgrade your spaceship, and get cozy in this relaxing adventure.

3470370.title: 色系战记
3470370.short_description: 《色系战记》 是一款融合涂地玩法的 Roguelike 卡牌构筑游戏。 卡牌不再造成数值伤害，而是以范围形状争夺领地颜色。 扩张地盘、部署防线、守护核心，在混乱的战局中击败对手， 最终封印吞噬色彩的虚空领主，让彩虹重返大陆。

2822980.title: 纵火游戏 ARSONATE
2822980.short_description: 在火焰蔓延的死亡游戏中，与主持人斗智斗勇。烧尽一切，成为最后的幸存者。你害怕死亡吗？

3277880.title: Warped Universe
3277880.short_description: 合作PvE科幻掠夺射击游戏，每次任务对所有人都至关重要。探索未知，防御设施，升级你的回声战甲，赋能整个星系。

4597330.title: SHRIMP GAME: KRILL CONFIRMED
4597330.short_description: SHRIMP GAME: KRILL CONFIRMED is a solo or multiplayer third-person shooter RPG intro to SHRIMP GAME set in an abyssal realm. Pilot your SHRIMP platform to fight giant sea monsters, master elemental classes, and unearth secrets in a co-op campaign, or just krill your friends in multiplayer PVP!

2861210.title: HYPNOS
2861210.short_description: HYPNOS is a first-person adventure and exploration game, set in a lovecraftian megastructure fever dream. Enter the Nameless City at the edge of Dreams. Follow the trail into the shadow of the Holy Mountain. Embrace your destiny.

4694350.title: Nightmare Fishing Tournament
4694350.short_description: A fishing sim with a HORRIFYING twist!. It's not enough to simply HOOK a fish, players must ENTER THE WATER and take them on using WEAPONS like spearguns and floating mines! Once a fish is STUNNED, it must be REELED IN before it RECOVERS! Upgrade your ITEMS and use scales to CRAFT PERKS!

4716990.title: Beyond The Plastic Wall Demo
4716990.short_description: Set off on an adventure set in a sprawling world that blends satisfying, mechanical puzzles with a rich narrative. Explore a stunning pixel-art world, repair intricate machines & meet unforgettable characters in a story about connection, resilience, and life that clings on in a world left to ruin.

4559180.title: 포션 하실래요?
4559180.short_description: 一款独特又充满多巴胺的放置点击游戏:搅动锅子调制魔药,贩卖魔药赚取更多金币,解锁女巫的魔法以发现全新法术与无数魔药。走进奶奶那家阳光明媚的老魔药店,找回她遗失的魔药配方,告别见习女巫的身份,把配方上的每一种魔药通通收入囊中!

4706570.title: 银心 Demo
4706570.short_description: 内向阴郁的女高中生“月”寻找朋友“银心”的过程中，突然发现她可能是自己妄想出来的。在暴风骤雨一般的反转之中，她走遍每个世界，想要见到银心……

4727990.title: 翻车鱼 Demo
4727990.short_description: 从悠闲到疯狂：海洋生态系统Roguelite游戏。培育色彩斑斓、各具独特能力的鱼群，解锁强力道具击退Boss入侵。收集稀有鱼类，完善你的静谧虚拟水族箱。守住阵线，破浪而出！深不可测。

4078200.title: 矮人吞山
4078200.short_description: 矮人对黄金充满渴望，没有任何一座高山能阻挡他们的脚步！在这款轻松有趣的放置类游戏中，开采宝藏、发掘神器、升级矮人，去吞噬一座又一座更雄伟的山峰。

4218780.title: 眼球大富翁
4218780.short_description: A retired hero runs an inn within the living forest, but strange shadows and awakening ruins draw him back into mystery. Unravel a rising curse, explore forgotten magic, and step into an adventure shaped by every traveler.

4485560.title: 猎捕 试玩版
4485560.short_description: 《猎捕》是一款将大自然残酷而精妙的真实食物链关系转化为竞技博弈的集换式卡牌游戏。在这里，知识就是你最锋利的爪牙，策略则是你生存的唯一法则。

3693650.title: 淘淘旧货铺
3693650.short_description: 进入轻松惬意的《淘淘旧货铺》，模拟经营属于你的复古杂货铺！在成堆的货箱中寻宝，将满载回忆的衣物、玩具与古董布置成迷人的风景。与熟客成为朋友，帮他们圆梦，把小店扩展成邻里欢聚的暖心角落！

2397510.title: 海盗：加勒比海战 Corsairs - Battle of the Caribbean
2397510.short_description: 准备好在加勒比海的波涛中搜寻荣耀与财富吧！这是一款沉浸式策略游戏，背景设定在海盗世界。驾驭动荡的海洋，管理多样化的船员，建立海上霸权，保障舰队的未来。

3866920.title: 海参大作战
3866920.short_description: 海参将拯救地球——海参大作战 (NAMAKORIUM)是一款最多支持4人一起游玩的热闹合作型即时战略游戏。指挥已逝人类留下的“海洋清洁工”海参，一起清扫被污染的海洋吧！

4596200.title: 水下双雄 Demo
4596200.short_description: 在这款风格可爱的俯视角动作射击游戏《水下双雄》中，你需要左手操控撞飞一切的海龟！右手操控射爆敌人的水母！在这片危机四伏的水底，对抗一波波凶猛的鱼群，不断选择变强的方向！是时候挑战一下你的双手能否征服这片水底了！又或者你有一位默契无间的好友？

4520820.title: 極书院演义 Demo
4520820.short_description: 大明極书院，一座为益国遴选英才的顶尖学府。开封少年殷天将于此开启为期一年半的学府生涯。然而...表面充满热血与欢笑的书院背后，权力的暗流早已涌动——皇室内部正竞相在此寻觅天纵之才。

2393580.title: 末日车队
2393580.short_description: 在《末日车队》中体验末日生存的挑战！被僵尸侵袭的末日废土上，你将带领幸存者车队，驾驶房车，穿越广阔的世界，在末日废土中努力求生。收集资源，打造卡组，与僵尸战斗，探索开放世界，升级房车，制作武器，寻找末日的真相，重建人类文明！

4395530.title: 旅人物語 〜Journeys of Real People〜 Demo
4395530.short_description: 「你真的甘心就这样过一辈子吗？」献给每天只是勉强过日子的你。 这是一款结合养要素的视觉小说，以曾造访98个国家的步理惠子等真实旅人为原型，约80%内容取材自真实经历所描绘而成。 作为东京一间旅人聚集酒吧的店员，你将接触他们不按常理出牌的人生，并在相互影响中成长。 在这个过程中，你原本根深蒂固的价值观，势必会被彻底动摇。 这是一场，让迷惘的你遇见「全新自己」的模拟体验。

4638600.title: 忍者刺杀行动
4638600.short_description: 忍者伙伴接到了暗杀任务，有一个幕后BOSS掌控着黑市的资金交易。你的老板为此损失了很多钱，为了在黑市中拥有话语权，他在忍者联盟下发了悬赏令。只要能取下黑市幕后BOSS的首级，就能拿到高额悬赏。你和你的伙伴成为了最佳人选，穿过丛丛关卡，突破敌人的防线，取得最终BOSS的首级，是你们的终极目标。

3690270.title: 女生宿舍 -女子宿舍的管理员- After
3690270.short_description: 女子宿舍生活还没有结束！享受在樱叶女子学院上演的三人组热闹日常吧！

3690260.title: 女生宿舍 -女子宿舍的管理员-
3690260.short_description: 管理宿舍真是辛苦——尤其住宿生还全部都是女孩子！主人公春人有办法打理好这片花园吗？

4126310.title: 冒险家艾略特的千年奇谭 序章体验版
4126310.short_description: 融合像素图与3DCG的“HD-2D”系列首度推出全新动作RPG！

4276660.title: Yomifuda: Kanji Survivors
4276660.short_description: 你的生存之路，由墨迹书写！凭借语言的力量，在无尽的妖怪狂潮中生存下来。《Yomifuda》将肉鸽（Rogue-lite）动作玩法与日语学习系统相结合，内含超过1000个常用汉字。扩充你的词汇量，解锁力量，摧毁地狱的邪恶。

4666230.title: XX Fulfillment Center Demo
4666230.short_description: 您已入職物流中心，擔任「包裝兼職合同工」。 在飛速運轉的傳送帶與越來越多的規則之下，您還能找到屬於自己的幸福嗎？

2562020.title: WorldShaper Idle
2562020.short_description: Relax and build your own world! Discover new tiles by experimenting with tile placement. Use their bonuses to optimize your production, or just sit back and become ever more powerful! What will your worlds look like?

3962000.title: Without A Doubt
3962000.short_description: First dates are awkward. Last dates are awful. A short first-person narrative experience about the beginning and end of a relationship. It's also cheaper than a real date.

4634530.title: Where the Echo Sleeps Demo
4634530.short_description: 《Where the Echo Sleeps》是一款拥有多重结局、以剧情为核心的医院接待员模拟游戏。在传染病末世中成为一名医院接待员，安排患者的就诊顺序。

4196000.title: Where Is Lena?
4196000.short_description: 为了拯救心爱的女人，你敢潜入这所致命的设施吗？在阴冷的地下走廊里，你不仅要面对复杂的谜题，还要对抗恐怖的生物。每一步都有代价，每一颗子弹都至关重要。告诉我，为了爱，你愿意付出多大的代价

4738780.title: Watch Out: Shark! Demo
4738780.short_description: 2D pixel art arcade survival. Brave the ocean's dangers, face the shark, and chase the high score!

4655410.title: Vacation Adventures: Park Ranger 18 Collectors Edition
4655410.short_description: A family friendly Hidden Object Game set in the Great Outdoors

4660950.title: Typegrinder
4660950.short_description: A keyboard-first typing game built around discovery. Hunt new words across 3-to-12 letter brackets, forge speed-runs from your personal decks, and battle the world on daily online leaderboards. Pure typing, no fluff.

4670610.title: The Long Wake: What Remains Observed Demo
4670610.short_description: The town is empty. The nightmare isn’t. A third-person 3D survival horror game with roguelike elements and knowledge-based mechanics. Explore a deserted town trapped in a relentless loop, where each attempt reveals new paths, tools, and truths, escape before time runs out.

4181340.title: The Anomaly Detective
4181340.short_description: 你所看到的是幻觉还是现实？辨别的方法只有一个：闭上眼睛。保持理智，在这个诡异的酒店中观察6名嫌疑人，并拍下证据。在这个真相从不主动显现的氛围体验中，由你来决定该指控谁。

4654140.title: Tethyscope
4654140.short_description: Explore our planet's ocean to discover animals, plants, and shipwrecks. Take photographs to document your findings and sell them to fund upgrades to your submarine.

3406840.title: Technically Frogs Can Fly
3406840.short_description: A chaotic roguelite about a frog trying to keep up with child support. Fish, Mine, Gamble, and Fight your way through a world of odd jobs and risky choices to make each payment on time.

4511970.title: Team Rocket Project Demo
4511970.short_description: Team Rocket Project Demo played with 1-4 players is set in a retro futuristic world where you guide a rocket! Wield one or more of the 4 thrusters of the rocket and propel it to your destination! Adventure in unique levels, avoid traps and get the highest score! Two levels available in the demo!

4579360.title: TOSS
4579360.short_description: TOSS is a psychological tabletop horror game where every coin toss decides your fate. Kidnapped and forced to gamble for your life, you must earn enough to escape, knowing that luck can turn against you at any moment. One mistake, one bad toss, and everything you’ve fought for could be lost.

4654640.title: Specshong Demo
4654640.short_description: Cyndi wants you to turn up the volume and paint the town red. Import any song to generate chaotic levels in this intense rhythm shooter. Master absolute free movement, execute precision shots, and destroy the digital static to your favorite beats.

4616180.title: Snowplow Therapy
4616180.short_description: There is something deeply satisfying about clearing snow, and Snowplow Therapy is built around that feeling. Drive your plow, upgrade your truck, and improve your tools. The game focuses on a relaxing flow. But of course, there are surprises waiting for you...

4637070.title: Skin Lure
4637070.short_description: A man escapes to a remote mountain house after a tragic car accident, only to face terrifying paranormal events that refuse to let him go.

4616330.title: Second Monitor Gladiators Demo
4616330.short_description: A lightweight gladiator auto-battler designed to be played or watched on a second monitor.

4553790.title: Scallywags Demo
4553790.short_description: 在这款策略性海盗船员管理类roguelike游戏中，与一群乌合之众扬帆起航。追捕臭名昭著的海盗 船长，掠夺他们的宝藏，并在一次次混乱的航行中谱写属于你自己的故事。每一次航行都是一次 全新的冒险，每一个选择都将塑造你的命运，每一次胜利都将让你离真正的海盗传奇更近一步。

4586710.title: Rhythm Survivors Demo
4586710.short_description: Rhythm Survivors is a single player musical survivor-like. Fight off hordes of increasingly numerous monsters while collecting upgrades to compose powerful sequences of attacks. Only with perfect rhythm can you hope to survive the night!

3421660.title: Re:Blade
3421660.short_description: 《Re:Blade》是一款光标操作的渐进式动作类Roguelike游戏,每一次冒险都将重塑你的利刃,每一位Boss都将倒在你的脚步之下。

4165620.title: R-Type Dimensions III
4165620.short_description: Building on the legacy of R-Type Dimensions and R-Type Dimensions EX, Dimensions III has been completely re-envisioned with cutting-edge visuals and sounds, expanded gameplay modes, and a range of new features designed to deliver the most definitive modern edition of R-Type’s classic era.

4386810.title: Penguin Capitalism Simulator
4386810.short_description: Games are too stressful ... so I made one that literally plays itself

4576030.title: Patchkins Party Demo
4576030.short_description: Patchkins is a multiplayer racing game for 2 to 6 players where you build the course as you play. Each round, players draw and place objects like Platforms, Obstacles, and Specials, then race to the finish without dying.

4658970.title: PERSEPHONE Demo
4658970.short_description: Your username is "JLOUISE778". The PERSEPHONE simulation has been malfunctioning at the cost of dozens of subjects. You've been sent to find out what went horribly wrong.

4655450.title: One Last Hand Demo
4655450.short_description: One Last Hand 是一款支持2到6名玩家的混乱派对游戏，在这里扑克与 Battle Royale 正面碰撞。忘掉公平对局，扑克已经变得危险。参与 Secret Auction 争夺卡牌，使用强大的 Relic 扭转规则，并攻击你的对手。不要只是打出手牌，狠狠干掉你的朋友。

4735350.title: Moon Garden Demo
4735350.short_description: A cozy incremental game about growing your way home. Strategically plant flowers, optimize machinery, and grow your tree tall enough to escape!

3739620.title: Midnight Escape
3739620.short_description: 周末出游变成了一场绝望的生存之战。在《Midnight Escape》中，与3名好友组队，探索一栋恐怖的别墅，同时还要躲避一个无情生物的追捕。你们必须找到线索，解开错综复杂的谜题，并在黑夜吞噬所有人之前，找到众多逃生路线之一。

4726450.title: Man in the Mocha Demo
4726450.short_description: An active incremental game where you own a coffee shop, but your hidden agenda is to hack the customers who connect to your WiFi. Buy upgrades and grow your business!

3641260.title: Magnavis Demo
3641260.short_description: Magnavis 是一款支持 1–4 人合作的第一人称 3D 恐怖游戏。驾驶你的潜艇穿越狭窄的洞穴，避免撞击，完成指定任务，修复损坏的系统，无论如何，活下去。

4657940.title: Lured In Demo
4657940.short_description: Run your own cozy aquarium! Travel to different places to catch all types of fish. Bring them back for idle profits, or sell them for instant cash. Unlock research for new upgrades, and ascend for powerful bonuses. Customize your character and tanks, and make your aquarium your own!

3630620.title: Legend of Hiraq
3630620.short_description: Traverse a blazing desert and brave ancient ruins teeming with deadly traps, enigmatic djinn, and hidden lore. Experience heart-pounding action and thrilling mysteries in this epic adventure.

4663330.title: Jailer of Y
4663330.short_description: 《Jailer of Y》是一款以秩序与禁锢为主题的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家将在经典 RPG 战斗系统中操控角色进行攻击、防御与技能施放，通过规划每个回合的行动、持续强化角色能力，并在层层升级的战斗挑战中体验兼具策略性与成长感的单人冒险。

4650930.title: Home Rescue: Clean and Restore Collector's Edition
4650930.short_description: 沉浸在打造温馨的游戏中。作为 Jane，你将清洁、寻找隐藏物品并修复房屋。每个场景都有新的任务、小游戏和轻松的谜题，营造宁静氛围。

4650920.title: Hidden Weekend: The American Getaway Collector's Edition
4650920.short_description: 一场温馨的自然之旅：野餐、露营、小游戏与找物玩法。打造属于你的完美度假，享受每一个瞬间。

4490710.title: Hardware Tycoon
4490710.short_description: 从1986年到2026年，设计尖端CPU。经营自家工厂或为竞争对手制造芯片。研究突破性技术，领导工程师，在全球购买和建设办公室，在四十年的技术历史中争夺市场主导权。

4375970.title: Grey Wake Demo
4375970.short_description: In an intimate narrative-driven exploration game, wake up on a forgotten island between life and death equipped with only a compass, a telescope, and a weathered sailboat. Chart the haunted archipelago, relive faded memories, and uncover the truth about what, and who, you came here to find.

4696970.title: Galactic Speed Legends Demo
4696970.short_description: Compete at full speed in high-stakes sci-fi races. A fast-paced arcade racer where precision timing is everything. Maintain your momentum and push your limits.

4568090.title: Frostland
4568090.short_description: 点击、收集、建造与制作。《Frostland》是一款设定在雪谷中的温馨2D点击游戏。加工资源并打造强大的工具，帮助魔法狗狗Pitty踏上传奇法杖的旅程。

4695370.title: Endless Samurai Demo
4695370.short_description: One Strike. Total Tension. A Japanese parry-driven roguelite that blends turn-based depth with fast-paced action. Master the parry. Control the battle.

4714740.title: Edge of Water Demo
4714740.short_description: 这是一个关于少女成长的故事。她将引领着漂浮的村庄，踏上了一场鱼群迁徙的朝圣之旅。驱赶海中生灵、守护鱼群免于危险， 在壮丽的景色与暗流涌动的海域之间破浪前行。

4527980.title: Ecos de Luaré
4527980.short_description: A supernatural mystery visual novel where your choices shape relationships and determine the fate of a coastal town. Explore ancient secrets, unravel supernatural enigmas, and make decisions that lead to three distinct endings based on your choices across four intense days.

4656230.title: Dread Admiral Demo
4656230.short_description: A turn-based naval roguelite where every ship you lose is gone forever. The Black Fleet hunts you. Your Flagship must survive.

4464440.title: Don't Mind the Robots Demo
4464440.short_description: Outsmart the robots in this strategic tower defense game. Build deadly mazes, upgrade your towers, and unlock powerful perks. Every decision matters as you adapt your defenses against increasingly stronger waves of AI-infested opponents.

3861690.title: Don't Get Fired! Demo
3861690.short_description: The company is going under and corporate has made YOU the office manager. Turn things around quick or everyone's doomed. Run the office, keep employees productive, and avoid disasters. Muscle through the workday or automate the grind. Play solo or with friends — just Don't Get Fired!

4694280.title: Dolf Demo
4694280.short_description: Underwater mini-golf with cybernetic dolphins. Online multiplayer for 1-8 players.

4644660.title: Deskpet Engine
4644660.short_description: 一只可爱的宠物会在你的电脑桌面上自由活动，陪伴你工作、学习和娱乐。宠物可以参与小游戏或者打工来赚取金钱，以满足宠物的生存需求！

4666860.title: DRUMP SIMULATOR Demo
4666860.short_description: A satirical game where you make choices as President Tonald Drump.

4724120.title: DEEP DIVER Demo
4724120.short_description: 你能成为最强的潜水员，深入地球最深的海域吗？在水下度过的每一秒都会变得更加神秘，而每向下一米都会更加危险。通过30种不同的能力和技能树强化你的潜水员，并努力生存下去。

4670860.title: Cubical World
4670860.short_description: This is a cube-based survival sandbox. You place cubes break cubes ad experience a procedurally generated world. Do whatever YOU wish to do. Build a house or a statue. Fight ants sheep zombies and survive through the night. Play regular world generation or try islands or flat. There is lots to do...

3824050.title: Crush The Rebellion!
3824050.short_description: The galactic empire is under siege from the rebel scum in all directions! Fight through endless waves of rebel ships using all of the weapons and resources at your disposal as you execute your sole orders: to Crush The Rebellion!

4507620.title: Crazy Oddballs: Idle RPG
4507620.short_description: Build your oddball team, grind endless loot, and optimize ridiculous gear combinations in a chaotic idle RPG with guild battles, PvP, and long-term progression.

4275530.title: Black Mountain of Tlaltecuhtli Demo
4275530.short_description: Cinematic Third‑Person Action horror game Climb sheer rock faces, leap across collapsing ruins, and engage in tight, cover‑based firefights against hostile factions who are just as desperate and just as trapped as you. While trying to escape something so evil and primal, civilization ending.

3200940.title: Big Bad Soccer
3200940.short_description: Fast-paced arcade football where skill and physics decide everything. Control a massive ball, build and steal Super Hits, and score fast — no stats, no fouls, no upgrades.

4577180.title: At Night: Haunted Ride
4577180.short_description: At Night: Haunted Ride 将于明天盛大开幕。今晚，你要进行最后的试运行。乘上矿车，修理道具，反复测试，并且不要让“他们”注意到你。

4413900.title: Anything But A Gun
4413900.short_description: A roguelite first-person shooter set in a corporate office overrun by AI. Battle through randomized floors using 20 bizarre weapons. Earn achievements, unlock upgrades, and take back everyone's jobs. The only rule? It's Anything But A Gun.

4704540.title: Ami's Pearl Dive Demo
4704540.short_description: Ami's Pearl Dive is a quaint underwater adventure game developed for the Game Boy Color! Help Ami dive deeper to find her missing mermaid friend, collect pearls and meet interesting faces along the way!

4729590.title: Allrest Inn Demo
4729590.short_description: Take the reins of a cosy countryside tavern where the bonds you forge with adventurers shape the outcome of their quests.

4034710.title: Minesweeper Sonar Demo
4034710.short_description: A tense twist on the classic Minesweeper game! Each missile has a Minesweeper grid, solve them to protect your boat and earn currency, use the currency to attack the enemy ship and repair you boat.

4702640.title: Just Prices Demo
4702640.short_description: A sign-language based point-and-click adventure sci-fi game

4200560.title: Stitchlings
4200560.short_description: Play solo, or grab a friend and embark on a bite-sized co-op combat adventure fighting toy monsters, picking them apart, while you stitch together your uniquely customized Stitchlings!

896010.title: Clockwork Ambrosia
896010.short_description: Design your own arsenal in Clockwork Ambrosia, a steampunk metroidvania in the vein of a run-and-gun platformer. Join Iris, an airship pilot who must combat an army of deadly robots and monsters, and experiment with over 100 rule-based weapon mods and armors to prevail through this wild adventure!

2483190.title: 极限竞速：地平线 6
2483190.short_description: 驾驶超过 550 辆真实存在的赛车，探索日本的绝美风光，在《Forza Horizon》有史以来最宏大的冒险中成为竞速传奇。

4501880.title: 无限 Galgame
4501880.short_description: 一款由人工智能驱动的视觉小说，每个故事都是为你量身定制的——实时生成。输入任何内容，见证你独特世界的展开。

4366380.title: 午后前线
4366380.short_description: 《午后前线》是一款免费的轻度 Roguelike 塔防游戏。你需要在随机选择中不断完善队伍，强化角色，构筑适合当前局势的组合，守住防线，击退敌潮。

4603360.title: One Dumb Wizard Demo
4603360.short_description: One Dumb Wizard is an action roguelike where you play as a wizard hell-bent on getting their money back from the Bartender. Find charms to power up your wand, parts to craft new wands, and strategically sling spells in your singular mission to GET YOUR MONEY BACK.

3535390.title: Mination Demo
3535390.short_description: Mination is an arcade twin-stick shooter/survivor with roguelite and story elements. Take control of Minerva as she mines ores, avoids or fight pirates and aims for a high score! Earn space-dollars to upgrade your ship, progress the story to unlock rewards and head back to get on that leaderboard!

4663380.title: Hello Duck
4663380.short_description: A cozy idle desktop game where a little duck eats grass, lays eggs, earns coins, and lives a lazy life on a tiny floating island.

4573300.title: Godborne: Ashes of Ramessu Demo
4573300.short_description: 一款合作式第一人称塔防射击游戏，玩家需要建造防御工事，对抗一波又一波的敌人，并揭开古代文明的秘密。

4732650.title: Dice Have No Eyes Demo
4732650.short_description: ★ Surreal dice-rolling roguelike about luck and greed ★ Feed your dice dumplings, collect game bending trinkets, roll too much and lose it all. Or get lucky, unlock King Fetus, meet God and you might just wake up.

2383130.title: 迷雾计划
2383130.short_description: 在这款开放世界生存恐怖游戏中，独自或与好友合作探索偏远岛屿。使用重力枪操控物体与敌人，建造移动列车基地，对抗巨型怪物，捕捉生物并升级装备，在充满废弃设施的危险世界中生存。

4693570.title: 薪动猪猪
4693570.short_description: 想可视化看到你的每秒收入吗？想体验一笔收入连续跳动到账的爽感吗？让薪动猪猪告诉你！陪伴猪猪，获得更多胡萝卜代币，收集更多猪猪存钱罐样式～

3542380.title: 符文之骰
3542380.short_description: 短时战术构筑。投掷骰子，创造魔法连锁反应。从具有独特技能的不同英雄职业中选择。在骰子、圣物和符文之间建立协同效应，击败挑战性Boss。

4676730.title: 探偵Rと預言者J Demo
4676730.short_description: Gather evidence and uncover the truth through your interactions with others in this mystery adventure game about a case where past and present collide.

4671490.title: 二木的推箱冒险
4671490.short_description: 这是一款极简的想让玩家发现知识和学习知识的推箱子游戏。感受绞尽脑汁弄清楚每个箱子的机制最终解开谜题的畅快感吧。

4278200.title: 事務所4649(Office4649)
4278200.short_description: 感谢您申请本职位。 ……什么？您并没有申请？没关系，您已经被录用了。恭喜！ 您的工作很简单：在一间普通的日式办公室中拍摄“异常现象”。 请放心，一位看起来很友善的同事会为您指引^^

4682490.title: 三生忆梦(Dream Of Three Lives)
4682490.short_description: 在忘川街道上，帮助滞留的孤魂拼凑残碎记忆。这是一款融合数织解谜与剧情叙事的治愈系游戏，跟随失去记忆的灵魂，踏上一段温暖而感伤的黄泉之旅。

3701910.title: Winnie-the-Pooh Hops for Honey
3701910.short_description: Uh oh. Winnie-the-Pooh ate all of the honey that Christopher Robin set aside for the annual Honey Festival! It's up to Winnie to set things right and prove that his heart is bigger than his stomach by adventuring into the Hundred Acre Wood to collect enough honey to save the festival!

3185420.title: Wilder Bound - 荒野拼图
3185420.short_description: 在荒野网格中，开拓领地、招募居民、采集资源、对抗怪物和未知的风暴。简约风格的经营策略游戏，探索、贸易、拓展领地，谱写属于自己的田园牧歌。

4634910.title: Trees Inc
4634910.short_description: 在这款增量放置游戏中建立一个自给自足的森林！你可以砍伐树木、实现工人自动化生产、叠加升级以获得指数级增长，并利用转生和基于经验值的特权在每一局中不断突破你的产量上限。

1379090.title: Tokyo Re:Connect Demo
1379090.short_description: Spring is the season of first meetings. Begin your new life in the city of Tokyo as Shindou Touki. Meet many colorful characters, forge romances, and live out your high-school days, in this interactive story with cutting-edge artwork and a moving soundtrack.

4245830.title: ThrustX Demo
4245830.short_description: Start as Santa. Unlock a pig, a cop and more. Beat each other senseless in a chaotic 2.5D brawler, with proximity chat, so you can hear them suffer. New fighters every season with a free season pass. Best of five. May the most unhinged player win.

4726520.title: The Punchbag Machine Demo
4726520.short_description: Pixel-neon rhythm roguelite. Notes fall, punch to the beat, six strike directions, 27 machines. Collect punch cards, stack artifacts, hold the combo — miss the score target and the run is over.

4736110.title: The Hidden Evils Club Demo
4736110.short_description: Defend Weird Hill against relentless zombie waves. Build towers, manage resources, command heroes, and uncover the secrets behind a town that refuses to die.

4733780.title: Terminal Cursor Demo
4733780.short_description: Terminal Cursor is a fast‑paced reflex arcade game where you dodge evolving bullet patterns and survive as long as possible. Every movement matters. Features intense runs, rising difficulty, high‑score focus, and an original soundtrack by David‑Ștefan Horecica.

4640030.title: Teeworlds : Archive
4640030.short_description: TeeworldsArchive是一款免费社区支持在线多人游戏，包括死亡竞赛和感染模式等，在所有主流PC操作系统上均可运行。和多至64名玩家在Tee的世界里战斗或合作！你也可以在带有音乐的地图中游玩！

4279080.title: Tattoo Shop Simulator Demo
4279080.short_description: 经营你梦想中的纹身店！提供纹身和穿孔服务，个性化定制你的店铺，并管理员工。解锁新技能，骑上摩托车在这座充满活力的城市中自由驰骋。购置房产，击退恶棍，将一家小店发展成为全城最大的品牌！

4639840.title: Tartaria: Frozen Frontier Demo
4639840.short_description: 在这款以严酷的北方土地为背景的回合制策略游戏中，领导你的氏族，建造定居点，并在敌人的突袭中生存下来。

4624850.title: Super Shout Showdown Demo
4624850.short_description: 像动漫角色一样用你的声音施放魔法！在决斗、团队战或混乱的大乱斗模式中战斗，学习、连携并精通 25+ 种独特法术。

4508350.title: Spirit Cleansers
4508350.short_description: Explore a Heian Estate, uncover cursed objects, and engage in Turn-Based Strategy. During turn-based combat, fight as both priest and warrior synergizing their unique abilities to quell the spiritual mischief plaguing the estate!

4551940.title: SpellCatcher
4551940.short_description: Spell Catcher is an Open-World Animal-Collection 3D-Platformer where the goal of the game is using magical spells to collect all of the possible animals and send their data back to Big Magic University.

3698470.title: Simulacro
3698470.short_description: Simulacro is a 3D action-platformer with a measured pace and unconventional mechanics. In a world of strange physics and synthetic creatures, the experience challenges genre standards with a unique approach.

4634300.title: Shape Together
4634300.short_description: Shape Together is a factory-building game: lay mines, belts, and machines, automate shapes, and use them to defeat monsters and bosses. Hold back waves, grow stronger over time—solo or with friends on Steam.

4643520.title: Scoundrel
4643520.short_description: A solo card roguelite where a single shuffled deck is the entire dungeon. Draw four, face three, survive the deck. Fast runs, brutal choices, just one more.

4738950.title: SUBSELF: Lies Deep Demo
4738950.short_description: You are a prisoner offered a single chance at freedom. In exchange, you must descend into the depths of an alien ocean and recover lost data from a sunken research station, abandoned under mysterious circumstances by a powerful space mega-corporation.

4417950.title: Roadhouse Simulator - Prologue
4417950.short_description: Experience the uncle’s story before the events of Roadhouse Simulator and explore his humble beginnings while trying your skill as a bouncer at a roadhouse or Route 66.

4693190.title: Revenge & Defend
4693190.short_description: A boy's village was burned. His people were killed. Years later, he returns — with an army of monsters. But the king he hunts is nothing like his father. He is just. He is loved. He will not fall without a fight. Two campaigns. One tragedy.

4712920.title: Remain At Your Desk Demo
4712920.short_description: 一款黑客题材的放置/增量游戏：白天伪装忙碌，晚上从公司窃取数据。出售情报换取积分，或保留以获取更强优势但提高怀疑值。一场失败的审计，就会让你从实习生重新开始。

4592560.title: Ratalorica
4592560.short_description: 即使您在电脑上工作或娱乐，也能随时关注 GRATS 的动态。您的每一次点击、每一次按键、每一个操作，都在为 GRATS 提供动力。

4532370.title: Provisional Authority: An AI Governance Simulation
4532370.short_description: Balance growth, stability, and public trust while an AI observes your every move. Guide a nation through economic crises and political pressure — but be prudent, because the system you rely on may decide it can govern better than you.

4428260.title: Primal Sands VR
4428260.short_description: An immersive VR hunting experience where precision, patience, and timing decide every shot. Train your aim, track desert animals across vast sands while learning to differentiate between them and experience the first GCC-developed ethical hunting game that teaches you how to hunt responsibly.

4619950.title: PopVibe
4619950.short_description: PopVibe 是一款以流行音樂為核心的休閒節奏遊戲。只需使用鍵盤，你就能以簡單、易上手的模式隨多首曲目共舞。這款遊戲專為那些追求簡單音樂互動體驗的玩家而設計。

4674830.title: PROT Demo
4674830.short_description: PROT is a unique sci-fi sandbox adventure. You are PROT, a little lost dustbin-shaped robot. Use your creativity and problem-solving skills to collect, recycle, and fabricate tools and build a rocket. Your family is scattered across the solar system and needs your help.

4728770.title: Orca Insurgency Demo
4728770.short_description: Play as an orca in a fast-paced ocean rebellion against yachts, whalers, and human greed. Smash boats, rescue your pod, command other orcas, hunt with echolocation, and test absurd weapons from a mysterious octopus arms dealer. The Orca Insurgency begins.

4733230.title: Nova Impact Demo
4733230.short_description: Pilot your ship and survive the arena! Test the core loop of this unique Space RPG: dodge, shoot, and build your perfect loadout (capped at lvl 15). Prove your worth by climbing the V.O.I.D. leaderboard to fight alongside the Champion in an intense score-attack phase.

4655760.title: Ninja Survivor
4655760.short_description: Master the way of the blade in this relentless ninja roguelike. Survive endless waves of demons across 5 brutal stages. Upgrade weapons, collect powerful glyphs, and become the ultimate shadow legend. Dark Fantasy. Bullet Hell. Perma Death.

4704330.title: Night Parking
4704330.short_description: Night Parking - Get ready for an exciting adventure in the city at night! Your task is to park your car in the most difficult spots using your dexterity and precision.

4734910.title: Moto Trial Turbo Demo
4734910.short_description: Moto Trial Turbo 是一款基于物理的 2D 街机摩托车越野挑战游戏。玩家将体验精彩刺激的赛道、暗藏玄机的陷阱、秘密内容，甚至还有玩家自制关卡！在高难度赛道中挑战计时，并在排行榜上与来自世界各地的玩家一较高下。

4629750.title: Moksha
4629750.short_description: 在每次新游戏都会改变的地图中穿行，你唯一能看到的就是手电筒照亮的地方。在探索空间的同时，避开那个正在追捕你的生物，揭开你为何身处此地、甚至身在何处的谜团。

4683240.title: Modern Artillery Strike
4683240.short_description: Turn-based artillery strategy game featuring units inspired by D-30, Grad, Smerch, and more—plan, aim, and strike enemy targets on a stylized battlefield.

4511540.title: Mittelland AD Origins
4511540.short_description: Attain fame and fortune in late medieval Europe! Prove your economic prowess, outmaneuver your rivals, and immortalize yourself in the history books! The classic economic simulation set from 1500 onwards.

4713150.title: Mirage - Idle RPG Demo
4713150.short_description: An idle incremental arena survivor where you fight waves of enemies, collect loot, and grow stronger every run. Choose from three classes, forge gear, run a shop, tend a garden, and keep progressing even while you're away.

4307260.title: Memories : Silenced
4307260.short_description: A first person psychological horror experience set in a quiet suburban home. Witness a violent crime, uncover unsettling events, and endure a night where fear slowly takes over familiar spaces. Explore a grounded environment where tension builds through atmosphere and subtle storytelling.

4075590.title: Membrillo Hid My Socks
4075590.short_description: Membrillo Hid My Socks is a silly point & click hidden object game about finding your missing socks after your mischievous cat went on a rampage.

4743630.title: Mana Runner Demo
4743630.short_description: Mana Runner is a 2D retro-cyberpunk RPG featuring a real-time action battle system. Traverse the dystopian streets of an alternate 1997 New Orleans. Hire Hackers, Enforcers, Mana Priests, and other specialists as you fight back against the corruption of the mega-corps.

4299590.title: MARINE.EXE - Desktop RPG
4299590.short_description: MARINE.EXE is a revolutionary desktop overlay AFK RPG that transforms your entire screen into a sci-fi combat zone. Watch your elite marine squad battle alien hordes while you work, browse, or play other games - all happening transparently on top of your desktop!

4701600.title: LIT Creature Forge
4701600.short_description: Run virtual evolution and watch bizarre creatures learn to walk, jump, and crawl from random genes. A modern recreation of Karl Sims' 1994 evolving virtual creatures with MuJoCo physics, tunable gravity and population, plus tools to save, clone, and replay your champions.

4604820.title: Kingdom Klicker Demo
4604820.short_description: Kingdom Klicker is an idle clicker game you found on an old 80s computer that allows you to build, upgrade and organize a kingdom, but as you play it becomes more and more clear that something lurks beneath the surface, trying to get out...

4743450.title: Infinite Space: Mining Demo
4743450.short_description: Build and automate your own industrial space empire. Mine asteroids, manage logistics, expand production lines with drones and conveyors, explore new sectors through wormholes, and grow your mining operation across the galaxy.

4542810.title: Idle AI Factory Demo
4542810.short_description: Dive into the world of machine learning! Idle AI Architecture is a node-based automation incremental game where you harvest resources and train neural networks. Manage your economy, optimize your grid, and automate your way to a multi-million dollar tech empire.

4691090.title: INKOCHET: Paint The Walls With Your Arrows!
4691090.short_description: A free-to-play retro first-person puzzle game. Shoot arrows that ricochet up to 4 times in order to paint every wall! Solo or 2-player co-op. solo dev btw

4685530.title: Hulljackers Demo
4685530.short_description: Run a galactic pirate syndicate from a single screen. Raid ships, loot cargo, capture crew, and grow a fleet that raids in parallel while you watch. An incremental space-pirate idle game with tactical raids, a reputation-based black market, and a legendary endgame.

4379950.title: Fleshborn Demo
4379950.short_description: A short incremental game where you are tasked to clean a research facility from fleshy growths using your flamethrower. Collect resources and spend them in a vast upgrade tree to unlock new abilities.

3735120.title: Eden Coil
3735120.short_description: A snake puzzle game where, on some levels, you control multiple snakes by switching between them while the others remain asleep.

4564900.title: Drill-Ceratops
4564900.short_description: Help the Dad Triceratops to rescue his lost children and defeat the evil raptors by headbutting everything on his way in this jurassic sokoban!

4717290.title: Disarray Demo
4717290.short_description: 《Disarray》是一款黑暗生存恐怖游戏，你的任务是在夜晚对抗野蛮吸血鬼的侵袭中求生。在收到一封关于继承一个你从未听说过的亲戚的财产的信件后，你到达那里，却不知道等待揭开的黑暗秘密。

4740340.title: ComboChain Pulse Demo
4740340.short_description: ComboChain Pulse is a fast-paced sci-fi arcade shooter where you chain massive combos, destroy enemy fleets, and survive intense bullet-hell battles across futuristic warzones. Master powerful weapons, shields, and lightning-fast combat.

4692540.title: Choo Choo Defenders Demo
4692540.short_description: Build your track, assemble your train and deliver cargo and carnage in equal amounts in this on-the-rails take on tower defense! This demo lets you play the first world as much as you'd like!

4689520.title: Bumpers & Dragons Demo
4689520.short_description: Drop balls. Slay dragons. Peggle meets Balatro in a pachinko roguelite where physics meets strategy. Engineer your luck and push deep into procedurally generated dungeons.

3067440.title: Broken Shores
3067440.short_description: Dive into a peaceful beach cleanup adventure. A cyclone has left the island in disarray, and it’s up to you to restore its beauty. Explore serene shores and verdant trails, collecting debris to clean up. Enjoy relaxing gameplay, while you work to heal Broken Shores.

1828330.title: Bird Cage
1828330.short_description: You are a bird, stuck in a cage. No challenge is greater than freeing the bird. Every jump, every fall, every failure is on you in this rage platformer. Don't be a chicken. Escape the cage.

4726480.title: Bench Simulator Demo
4726480.short_description: 《Bench Simulator》是一款叙事驱动的模拟游戏，你将从一张沉默的公园长椅视角体验这个世界。 在本次 Demo 中，你将体验特别设计的一天。一天之中，会有 3 组不同的人来到公园，坐在长椅上，并留下属于他们的人生片段。有些时刻轻松有趣，有些令人不安，还有一些充满情感。

4275420.title: 93, Kuindzhi
4275420.short_description: 《奎因吉，93》是一款沉浸式第一人称氛围小品游戏，讲述了一个来自顿巴斯的18岁男孩的故事。故事将我们带到2022年3月——那个世界永远改变的时刻，进入一个过去、恐惧与疑虑获得声音的空间。

4486400.title: 虫林好汉：乌合之众 Demo
4486400.short_description: 《虫林好汉：乌合之众》是一款卡通风格的2D肉鸽自走棋，注重战术策略。玩家需要在绿林丛中招募各式爬虫"好汉"组成小队，通过不断战斗中构筑角色们的技能，装备，石碣铭文等，在时限之内打败祸首，平定祸乱。

4286970.title: 界墨山河 (INK Mountains And Rivers) Demo
4286970.short_description: 《界墨山河》是一款水墨风格的休闲挂机收集养成类游戏，题材取自类似山海经和洪荒的世界观，是一个全是奇珍异兽的山河世界。在这里，你可以收集各种异兽，培养它们变强，突破血脉提升境界，甚至可以修炼化形成兽姬形态。 游戏中拥有各种玩法，可派遣它们参与战斗、探索、砍树、挖矿、种田、炼药，炼器等等。 异兽们可以进化（突破血脉）变成新的种族角色。1阶角色（入世行者境）开始，每个角色都有对应的兽姬形态，当满足一定条件时即可修炼化形成兽姬。 游戏世界观和角色需求量比较庞大，目前还不是完全形态，会不定时更新加入新内容，新角色。

4601230.title: Reel & Deal
4601230.short_description: Reel & Deal 是一款单人钓鱼 Roguelite 游戏，每次出海都是一场高风险的谜题。读懂天气，搭配钓法与鱼饵，捕捉来自世界水域的 100 多种鱼类，将几次抛竿变成利润。

4635310.title: Quadrix Demo
4635310.short_description: Break the rules with powerful card synergies in this high-tempo block-placement roguelite. Recover collapsing boards, chase massive score chains, and build game-breaking combos across multiple modes, online PvP, Co-op, and a 100-level Campaign.

4698250.title: MINOS INITIATIVE - 2112 Demo
4698250.short_description: Explore 5 Floors of a dark scifi future where truth lies deeper than expected

4644770.title: Find Eat Hide Till Dawn Demo
4644770.short_description: This game is a horror survival single-player game. Avoid ghosts, find food, eat and survive. In each round, buildings, furnishings, and food are placed with some degree of randomness. Survival times stack. The longest survival time is saved.

4664500.title: Face the Puzzle: Masked Journey Demo
4664500.short_description: A grid-based puzzle game where the mask you wear changes the rules of the world. Push objects, reveal hidden hints, and command machines to solve handcrafted puzzles and reach the star.

4704860.title: Dave's House Demo
4704860.short_description: 在这款疯狂的第一人称合作恐怖游戏中，赶在奶奶吃掉你之前接听电话！严格按照订单烹饪食物，否则她会吃掉你！把食物放在桌子上然后躲起来——别把食物弄掉，否则她会吃掉你！如果她发现了你，跑！如果她抓住了你……别被吃掉！

4607550.title: 神祇Pantheon Demo
4607550.short_description: 暗物质之神x失业少女。双向救赎乙女视觉小说。

4729390.title: 白色归途 Demo
4729390.short_description: 操控一个白色小方块，解开谜题，收集■●●●，到达终点。

4581130.title: 猫鼠地牢
4581130.short_description: 《猫鼠地牢》是一款把地牢探索、背包构筑和多人混战卡牌战斗揉在一起的轻度 Roguelike 游戏。 在不断生成的地牢里探索房间，用你收集到的战斗牌决定每一场战斗的开局。炸弹随时可能引爆局势，你要在混乱又紧张的回合制对战中活到最后。

4501210.title: 坍塌世界
4501210.short_description: 《坍塌世界》是一款融合了“卡牌构筑”与“Roguelike”元素的创新策略塔防游戏。在这里，你需要招募各具特色的伙伴，构筑强大的专属技能卡组。深度的战前策略搭配随机多变的肉鸽关卡，打破传统塔防套路，让你的每一次防守都充满未知的挑战与无限的可能！

4699030.title: 回魂者 CallBacker Demo
4699030.short_description: 玩家可以试玩，提出意见，进行共创

4341540.title: 企鹅大战海豹 试玩版
4341540.short_description: 《企鹅大战海豹》是一款横向卷轴的实时策略游戏，融合塔防与单位部署玩法。玩家通过建造生产建筑、部署部队与释放战场技能推进战线，在像素风格的科幻战场上击败敌军。

4172250.title: 三国俱乐部经理
4172250.short_description: 《三国俱乐部经理》是一款三国题材布阵策略肉鸽游戏。核心为回合制布阵战斗，可自由招募名将、收集装备与被动技能。肉鸽模式采用杀戮尖塔式地图路线，含 6 大流派、独立难度与加点，商店可定向抽取道具与稀有强化。联赛模式轻松休闲，18 个阵营可选，积分制晋级，主打阵容搭配与养成。

4640200.title: Without Regret
4640200.short_description: Free those stuck in regret while uncovering the secrets of the world. Let the path you choose shape who you are and the world you envision.

4629200.title: To-Doodle Demo
4629200.short_description: 一款真正做到让你边打工边摸鱼的游戏，有什么比伪装成一款to do list的游戏更能唬住你老板的呢？再也不用偷偷摸摸的趁老板不注意玩两把了，这款游戏让你正大光明的摸鱼！

4123710.title: Slime Buddy Time
4123710.short_description: 在温馨的世界里照顾你的史莱姆宠物！ 玩小游戏、升级、解锁可爱物品，并为你的伙伴和它的家进行个性化定制。 在学习或工作时，最多可以同时养 3 个毛茸茸的伙伴。 放松、装饰，享受萌宠的陪伴——你将不再感到孤单。

4441130.title: Qiú 泅
4441130.short_description: A rescue robot had lost all teammates in a tsunami. Experience the emotional struggle and empathy in the post-apocalyptic world of Qiú, where, through a series of side-scrolling puzzle games, you help the robot achieve its dream, even at the cost of death.

4730000.title: Pathogen Demo
4730000.short_description: 卡组构筑类 Roguelike。利用卡牌与神器构建无限连击！

3127750.title: Pain Pain Go Away!
3127750.short_description: 这是一款通过打字消除“侵蚀少女内心的创伤之语”的心理诊疗题材打字冒险游戏。来到某家地下心理诊所的少女们，都背负着深重的内心阴影——有人反复离家出走，也有人坚信自己是杀人犯。请用你的打字之力，将她们从痛苦中拯救出来。

4597990.title: O Monumento
4597990.short_description: Explore the mysterious disappearance of the Royal Family in a secretive plaza that hides many secrets. "O Monumento" is a first-person short game of puzzles and investigation, featuring a time-limited mechanic—be quick or you’ll lose all the clues.

4676090.title: Lucky Shot Demo
4676090.short_description: The flick-shot roguelite FPS. Sharpen your aim, master different weapons, and break the game to reach massive high scores.

4743340.title: Heart Duels Demo
4743340.short_description: Heart Duels is a tactical single-player card battler where positioning matters. Build your deck, duel ranked NPCs, collect their cards, uncover their stories, and climb the ranks to become the King of Duels. Challenge your friends to duels in multiplayer!

4282170.title: Foo Is Missing
4282170.short_description: This is a 2D action game set in a cyberpunk world. Use the "rollback" ability, which allows you to teleport to a previous position, to solve stages packed with various challenges.

4080320.title: DEBUG NEPHEMEE Demo
4080320.short_description: DEBUG NEPHEMEE is a top-down 2D adventure game set in a world infested with bugs. Through a unique battle system and encounters with a colorful cast of characters, you will embark on a journey to "Debug" the world.

4741900.title: Corporate Climb Demo
4741900.short_description: A fast-paced online multiplayer arena game where momentum-based dual-swing movement is key. Outmaneuver enemies, collect valuable items, and complete your quota to win. With fully skill-based gameplay and intense competitive matches, survival depends on speed, precision, and smart decisions.

4332080.title: Cliché Horror 2000s: The Witch’s Lair
4332080.short_description: 《Cliché Horror Anos 2000: The Witch’s Lair》是一款受2000年代砍杀电影启发的第三人称恐怖游戏。四名年轻人为拍摄一部业余恐怖电影进入一座废弃豪宅，却发现那里存在的邪恶，只是更大阴谋的一部分。

4668070.title: Chicken Must Fry Demo
4668070.short_description: 《Chicken Must Fry》是一款幸存者类游戏。你将化身为拒绝被油炸的生鸡，横扫残暴的“炸物帝国”怪物。组合各种技能与道具，强化你的角色，在无尽的敌人狂潮中生存下来！

2804990.title: CODE EXIT Demo
2804990.short_description: 这是一款最多支持4名玩家组队的合作科幻恐怖游戏。玩家将在绝对追踪者带来的无力感与恐惧中执行任务。为了揭开人工智能密涅瓦暴走的真相，请深入陷入黑暗的设施，完成既定任务并死里逃生。

4330350.title: Besitupia: Demo
4330350.short_description: You have lost most of your memories after parabiosis. You will have to learn how to use your new abilities to figure out everything happening around you. Will you be able to adapt? Be sure to read “About the Game” before purchasing 👽

4493180.title: BATTLE OF YOKAN
4493180.short_description: 用炮击摧毁地面，将对手轰入深渊！用你的名字创造独一无二的YOKAN，展开线上1v1对决。由颤抖线条绘制的素描般战场等待着你。

4411940.title: Auragami
4411940.short_description: Auragami is a VR rhythm game that blends cosmic visuals with healing frequencies to create a meditative, motion-driven experience. It delivers atmospheric sensations, engaging you so that you may Unfold and Flow

4416790.title: 布鲁斯的喷气背包
4416790.short_description: 一款平台游戏。一只喷气背包。一个孤独的人。

4698200.title: SoulBound - Lys Fragments
4698200.short_description: A souls-like cooperative boss rush for 1 to 4 players. Pick from 5 classes, master MMO-inspired raid mechanics.

4628770.title: Seas of Static Demo
4628770.short_description: A methodical single-player strategy game. Command your fleet in an irradiated warzone, use deduction to uncover the locations of friends and foes, and bring your mighty arsenal to bear against all those who would defy the empire.

3710470.title: RAGING BILL
3710470.short_description: Raging Bill is a TPS sandbox in a mini open world, largely inspired by games like Goat Simulator. It features different gameplay styles (Shooter & Melee Combat, Racing, Exploration, Loot, Bodycam, and more),

4719190.title: Endless TD Demo
4719190.short_description: A simple yet unending tower defense game with a mix of idling and incremental progress. Tons of upgrades to purchase and endless progress to achieve.

4535880.title: Dice Have No Eyes
4535880.short_description: ★ Surreal dice-rolling roguelike about luck and greed ★ Feed your dice dumplings, collect game bending trinkets, roll too much and lose it all. Or get lucky, unlock King Fetus, meet God and you might just wake up.

4718350.title: Desktop Taxi Demo
4718350.short_description: 伴随着舒缓的Lofi音乐，在桌面角落进行的治愈系放置类出租车模拟。在忙碌的工作间隙，静静经营并升级你的小小出租车。

2223420.title: 纺织者之咏
2223420.short_description: 《纺织者之咏》是一款结合了类Rouge牌组构成、暗黑地牢回合制战斗、日系角色扮演、角色养成，讲述了一个关于剑与魔法与科幻故事的游戏。 选择你的角色、选择你的战斗风格、探索随机生成的沙盒地图、强化你的角色和军队、打败所有敌人....和可爱的小萝莉互动？

4596120.title: 破碎怪谈：东京塔 演示
4596120.short_description: The demo of BrokenLore: ASCEND is a first-person psychological horror experience featuring climbing and stealth mechanics. Follow two rooftop climbers as they confront a cursed tower and the terrifying Rokurokubi. The higher they climb, the closer they come to madness.

4654890.title: 生物实验室：畸变实验记录
4654890.short_description: 一款暗黑科幻生存恐怖视觉小说，你将在封闭设施中做出致命选择，揭开活体实验的真相。游戏主打选择驱动叙事、多结局与轻解谜，核心体验聚焦分支剧情而非高端画面。

4286580.title: 炮中战记
4286580.short_description: 源于高中的回忆。 故事发生在2024年上半年，临近高考的主角打算找朋友聊天，结果莫名的穿越到了书本的世界。而这个世界居然是 自己高中学校的翻版！但是里面的教师却被一股邪恶力量控制了，你必须和你的伙伴一起解决这里的麻烦才能回到现实世界！ 你将扮演来自炮中的 4 名学生，探索另一个世界 “炮中学院” 被邪恶势力量侵蚀的真相。你需要与人交流，收集道具 来应对这个世界各种各样的困难。注意，你的选择会影响各种任务的结果，甚至整个故事的走向！

4657470.title: Turning point Demo
